name: Jacky Rosen
subject: Trump's nickname for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
Team - President Trump came to Las Vegas on Saturday, and he didn't just hold a $25,000 per person fundraiser with Senator Heller - he also gave me a childish nickname:
[](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd6c0/4fbb2af3/7eef2770/5e8bfe35/254176404/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItdHJ1bXBpbm52IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGs3MzctZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-trumpinnv?refcode=jtk737-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
[**I have one question for him: Is that the best you 've got?**](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd6c0/4fbb2af3/7eef2770/5e8bfe35/254176404/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItdHJ1bXBpbm52IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGs3MzctZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-trumpinnv?refcode=jtk737-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

While he's focused on petty fights and divisive policies, we're building a real movement to turn Nevada blue and take back the Senate for Democrats - and it's powered by grassroots supporters like you.

Can you step up right away to help us fight back? **[https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-trumpinnv](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd6c0/4fbb2af3/7eef2770/5e8bfe32/254176404/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItdHJ1bXBpbm52IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJqdGs3MzctZnItbmQiLCJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-trumpinnv?refcode=jtk737-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thanks for having my back,
Jacky

**Rosen for Nevada
PO BOX 27195
LAS VEGAS, NV 89126**

| Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
---
Jacky Rosen is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Nevada - our best chance to flip a red seat blue and take back the Senate. We're working hard each day to elect her so she can fight for affordable health care, a cleaner environment, better education and more. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Please add us to your address book to make sure you keep receiving updates.

Emails are an important way for us to stay in touch with our supporters. 95% of our contributions come from grassroots donors giving less than $200 - and without that support, Democrats will lose our best opportunity to take back the Senate this November.

If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd6c0/4fbb2af3/7eef2770/5e8bfe33/254176404/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnVEZCQlFWRjFaWEo1VTNSeWFXNW5JSDE5IjoiNSwyNSw1MCwxMDAsMjUwLDUwMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=email_footer&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500"). Together, we can take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. If you'd like to receive fewer emails, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd6c0/4fbb2af3/7eef2770/5e8bfe30/254176404/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/s/fewer-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). If you'd like to stop receiving all emails, please [click here](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd6c0/4fbb2af3/7eef2770/5e8bfe31/254176404/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). From: Marcy Kaptur for Congress Date: Mon, June 25, 2018 at 9:15 AM Subject: SPECIAL ELECTION ALERT: Danny O'Connor in Ohio To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend,
Despite Ohio being a swing state which votes nearly 50-50 in every presidential election, extreme Republican gerrymandering has resulted in a lopsided congressional delegation of 12 Republicans and only 4 Democrats. But we can change that this summer.
Democrat Danny O’Connor is running in a CRITICAL Ohio Special Election on August 7. This is the most winnable Special Election this year.
And one recent poll shows Danny just 2 PERCENT behind. In Ohio!
**[Danny can win, but only with our help. We need to send 100 new donations now to ensure Danny can win and deny President Trump another go along Ohio Republican!](http://click.actionnetwork.org/mpss/c/4QA/ni0YAA/t.2in/dO7PIr33RNK01lYgkOvNrw/h4/aHO21LnX1DH2iKGsTPn3bYhi39zkK-2F5KLSrcx61KPVHU0-2B2V9PEDDpb8t4cJ6o6DaeceeJ4g4v7TPUyXTgXdKJoobRYL5xW5oTC4TH-2BAObDn6Os9Pcs18Glr7EyaoEg6Ste5OdLlEpBrnyOBFZdxQvI84fB9xdrd6PQb8dEc4oJQj13FjPh4-2F8hLXkuE6LO7JtB94um-2BmX1m8yj2hwF-2Bul3eTOJ-2FGpnm9M2qT-2BW3rf-2Bf0dJdG0jXgqhmNvT9PFV8d1GZU3XbSwPwQS8zyojocuLCmgN-2BswFodAgOdWIIU0H8kXyzFQNNkF-2BdbBt4c5hV-2B2GPRA-2F2x-2Bq4llp-2BjbHzK4GMA0exKY9yU5VnOlzp49xly3-2Fnsg8YeDKnOFlyD6bh)**
Friend, if everyone reading this chipped in just $5, we’d shatter our goal. So will you rush a donation directly to Danny’s campaign?

## [_CLICK HERE TO RUSH $5 TO HELP DANNY WIN >>>_](http://click.actionnetwork.org/mpss/c/4QA/ni0YAA/t.2in/dO7PIr33RNK01lYgkOvNrw/h5/aHO21LnX1DH2iKGsTPn3bYhi39zkK-2F5KLSrcx61KPVHU0-2B2V9PEDDpb8t4cJ6o6DaeceeJ4g4v7TPUyXTgXdKJoobRYL5xW5oTC4TH-2BAObCMgRej8FI1-2BivZ002KVdgofoim7JdATlwXrByGdIQ5ymLBepN1vGx6nbDvKzrPnkfaK-2BQkXN7hdHV9pRpknw5LM0js46cnut4i-2FmvI3en2EVxUEaupJQKZTfsdSzkMLTnP3TNHLOcwVq4M-2Bh68BFZuqqilh4Gek-2FDFjnyI46kVI1nNGVaCaKSDl3GuI3EjjkFX-2FwBqUVml4673se4S8JSHhomUnnHWTAZvc6pFMMchC5Jxdeeehu6dI1dza3KZ-2BmzUeMD-2FijjiM-2BttCWTevT2P)

Danny O’Connor is exactly the kind of Democratic voice we need in Congress:

* He’ll Protect Social Security and Medicare,
* He’ll create more economic opportunities for working and middle class Americans,
* And he’ll make sure working families’ voices are heard.

That’s why national Republicans are watching this race and they’ll do ANYTHING to stop Danny’s momentum. This is the most winnable special election of the year -- but we don’t have a lot of time.
**[People from across Ohio and the country are doing their part in what little time we have. But we need your donation to WIN.](http://click.actionnetwork.org/mpss/c/4QA/ni0YAA/t.2in/dO7PIr33RNK01lYgkOvNrw/h6/aHO21LnX1DH2iKGsTPn3bYhi39zkK-2F5KLSrcx61KPVHU0-2B2V9PEDDpb8t4cJ6o6DaeceeJ4g4v7TPUyXTgXdKJoobRYL5xW5oTC4TH-2BAObDYIbCDJSBDtj6Hx5bWW2YL2ZzxqxgGcgh-2B2C5-2BEv8RfsvziiFajd72WtoPH-2FCW1NdkDx9UElG4pDbWWHGnZ4NLvaRj8KVL9TJ7Dw5tnGtncg2v6byqnA-2FKAcl7nEZb4df2OMFveuTgVXqcvZ-2F-2FKh-2FIY6E01f-2FrAni8yik7YtVhmI8p4x4ecS0BmQgfvcny5sObfT5u9F4hAfRZj6fUvNLBw1IaPUSsojhOZ9qQeJBCJGFXH5ZbsKYAZfh79yJ9h-2BK2gCF0cLOW1KbxlG1BvE4t)** Let’s help Danny O’Connor take back a Republican seat!

name: Reba K.
subject: You can't miss this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
| | | Did you see Kyrsten's message?

Kyrsten is fighting for our shared values, but powerful men like Mike Pence, Mitch McConnell, and Joe Arpaio are all trying to slow her down. We can't let them get their way.

Please, pitch in $10 or more today to stop these guys in their tracks:

**[Secure link to donate:](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-eoq2-18?amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=1+-+Secure+link+to+donate&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_D5_180625_2_2_5&source=KS_EM_FR_D5_180625_2_2_5&refcode=KS_EM_FR_D5_180625_2_2_5") [http://act.kyrstensinema.com/June](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-eoq2-18?amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=2+-+httpactkyrstensinemacomJune&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_D5_180625_2_2_5&source=KS_EM_FR_D5_180625_2_2_5&refcode=KS_EM_FR_D5_180625_2_2_5")**

**\--- BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE ---**

**I 'll be up front: I need your help right now.**

We're facing the most important deadline of this campaign in just five days.

The numbers we report in our FEC filing directly reflect our strength, and we need to show a lot of power to prove we can go toe-to-toe with our opponents and their powerful backers.

**_[That's why the team and I have set an ambitious fundraising goal: $50,000 in the door before midnight on Saturday. Can you donate right now to help us get there? >>](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-eoq2-18?amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=3+-+Thatrsquos+why+the+team+and+I+have+set+a&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_D5_180625_2_2_5&source=KS_EM_FR_D5_180625_2_2_5&refcode=KS_EM_FR_D5_180625_2_2_5")_**

With all the chaos coming out of Washington, now more than ever Arizonans need an independent voice fighting for them in the Senate.

Whether it's protecting health care for people with pre-existing conditions, fighting harmful cuts to Medicare, or opposing the "gag rule" that would jeopardize access to essential care for millions of women, the stakes are high in this election. We need leaders who will stand up for our shared values.

**And really, that 's why I'm running: To do what's right for our state and our country and be a strong voice for everyday people.**

Getting to the Senate won't be easy. I need your help today to make sure we report the strongest possible numbers in our end-of-quarter FEC report.

**_[Can you send a contribution now to help me fight for our shared values and counter the misleading attacks my opponents have already started running against me?>>](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-eoq2-18?amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=4+-+Can+you+send+a+contribution+now+to+help+&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_D5_180625_2_2_5&source=KS_EM_FR_D5_180625_2_2_5&refcode=KS_EM_FR_D5_180625_2_2_5")_**

Thanks for all you do,

Kyrsten

|
---|---|---

|
---

Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
Kyrsten is running for the United States Senate because she wants to help Arizonans get their shot at the American dream. She's spent her career fighting for veterans and military families, listening to the middle class, and doing her part to fix a broken Washington.

She can't win this race without support from people like you. You can donate to Sinema for Arizona by [clicking here](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&amount=7&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=5+-+clicking+here&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_D5_180625_2_2_5&source=KS_EM_FR_D5_180625_2_2_5"). The numbers we report in our FEC filing directly reflect our strength, and we need to show a lot of power to prove we can go toe-to-toe with our opponents and their powerful backers. "" With all the chaos coming out of Washington, now more than ever Arizonans need an independent voice fighting for them in the Senate. Whether it's protecting health care for people with pre-existing conditions, fighting harmful cuts to Medicare, or opposing the "gag rule" that would jeopardize access to essential care for millions of women, the stakes are high in this election. We need leaders who will stand up for our shared values. And really, that 's why I'm running: To do what's right for our state and our country and be a strong voice for everyday people. Getting to the Senate won't be easy. I need your help today to make sure we report the strongest possible numbers in our end-of-quarter FEC report. "" Thanks for all you do, Kyrsten | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Sinema for Arizona Kyrsten is running for the United States Senate because she wants to help Arizonans get their shot at the American dream. She's spent her career fighting for veterans and military families, listening to the middle class, and doing her part to fix a broken Washington. She can't win this race without support from people like you. You can donate to Sinema for Arizona by "". Still support Kyrsten but want fewer emails? "" to receive fewer emails from our campaign. name: Roy Cooper
subject: Here we go again...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
I vetoed their latest attempt to mess with our elections. But this fight isn't over.
|
[](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203a6f/2fde7c66/469993fd/15683796/1427568701/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/stand-with-roy-to-protect-our-elections?gpsid=14_43_1586&source=em18_180625_Voting_adv_gq_act__rc_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180625_Voting_adv_gq_act__rc_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=1")
---
Here we go again, friends.

Republican leaders in the legislature are messing with our elections -- this time they're trying to change the early voting schedule.

The last time they tried something like this, the courts said the law targeted African Americans "with almost surgical precision" and struck it down.

Now they're back at it again.

[**Today, I vetoed their latest attempt to mess with our elections. But this fight isn't over. Add your name to stand with me.**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203a6f/2fde7c66/469993fd/156837a9/1427568701/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/stand-with-roy-to-protect-our-elections?gpsid=14_43_1586&source=em18_180625_Voting_adv_gq_act__rc_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180625_Voting_adv_gq_act__rc_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=2+-+Today+I+vetoed+their+latest+attempt+to+m")

North Carolina is stronger when more people are involved in our elections.

True democracy should make it easier for people to vote, not harder.

When I was elected governor, I promised to protect the right of every registered North Carolinian to participate in our democratic process.

[**Add your name if you're with me in this fight.**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203a6f/2fde7c66/469993fd/156837a8/1427568701/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/stand-with-roy-to-protect-our-elections?gpsid=14_43_1586&source=em18_180625_Voting_adv_gq_act__rc_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180625_Voting_adv_gq_act__rc_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name+if+youre+with+me+in+this+f")

Thanks for all you continue to do for North Carolina,

Roy | | [**Add your name ->**](http://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1203a6f/2fde7c66/469993fd/156837ab/1427568701/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZhU1ZBbEpRPT0iOiIyODQ1NyIsIkpTVkZUVUZKVENVbCI6ImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIn0=/ "http://act.roycooper.com/page/s/stand-with-roy-to-protect-our-elections?gpsid=14_43_1586&source=em18_180625_Voting_adv_gq_act__rc_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180625_Voting_adv_gq_act__rc_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=rcoop&firstname=&lastname=&zip=28457&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_content=4+-+Add+your+name+rarr")

name: The White House
subject: Never underestimate America’s farmers
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0096664701b321fbd82d8a0293c69122818364da6047b3ec2b1831b1350e0a6264f058e680a09fc4bb86e64176523c993bc016736a642b10) The White House • June 26, 2018
## The Day Ahead
| • | President Donald J. Trump will present the Medal of Honor to the late First Lt. Garlin M. Conner of Kentucky. [Watch live at 3:30 p.m. ET.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0096664701b321fb942d1c74bb66de25068f1787871c53b89695eca2cbcfbc863fb0c64b72a0055afab6082786eab321dafcd1de9071467b)
---|---
• | Vice President Mike Pence is in Brazil, where today he will deliver a joint statement with Brazilian President Michel Temer.
## Never underestimate America's farmers
**"In 2011, a group of Chinese nationals** dug up genetically engineered seeds from an Iowa corn field and planned to steal and send them back to China, so they could be reverse engineered," Agriculture Secretary Sonny Perdue begins a _USA Today_ op-ed this week. "Those seeds, the result of years of research and millions of dollars of American investment, now stand as one of countless pieces of evidence in the case against China."
**China accounts for 87 percent** of counterfeit goods seized coming into the United States, and its intellectual property theft costs American innovators billions of dollars per year. A U.S. Trade Representative investigation identified several aggressive technology policies from China that put an incredible 44 million American jobs at risk.
**President Trump has taken long overdue action** to address China's unfair trade practices. Regrettably, China chose to retaliate, raising tariffs on $50 billion of U.S. exports. "China apparently has no intention of changing its unfair practices," President Trump said in a June 18 statement. "China might underestimate the strength and resolve of American farmers, but the president does not," Secretary Perdue writes.
[President Trump will protect American farmers from China's trade retaliation.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0096664701b321fb5a231567cf67c25aedc5ff41dd51df2da901aad5dc6754d2ffa0cd31cb10d7ca7fd1832e07146e036d6515389e7ab3ba)
**Go deeper** : [How the President is standing up to China's unfair trade practices ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0096664701b321fb416b51dacf8a08f8352c4e4ede3c0c37639be82d1c9348aaa32e62123e83076f9452be5f94fa371632139641e474fbf5)

---
|

## The road ahead in the Middle East
**His Majesty King Abdullah II bin Al-Hussein of Jordan** visited the White House yesterday, meeting with President Trump and thanking him for America's support in the Middle East. "If the rest of the world just took a little bit of your humility and your grace to help us, we'd be in a lot better position," King Abdullah II said.
**"You have done an incredible job** on the refugees and the camps and taking care of people," President Trump told the King. "The job you do on a humanitarian basis is fantastic."
**The Middle East has seen great progress** since the United States withdrew from the flawed Iran nuclear deal, President Trump said. Yesterday's meeting came about a week after Senior Advisor Jared Kushner and Special Representative for International Negotiations Jason Greenblatt met with King Abdullah II in Jordan, part of a series of meetings the U.S. officials held across the Middle East last week. Their conversations focused largely on facilitating peace between the Israelis and Palestinians.
[Watch President Trump host King Abdullah II in the Oval Office.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0096664701b321fbfffe8a5eb283b02c712e9e1ef9b06578da44182361f9ba43c4cce69a9457bc436c187c1279603218dae52fea28ecc449)
**More** : [To help the Middle East, a new Iran deal will require real commitments. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0096664701b321fb4ad923f3f7888ea32eff6b76dcad4a8255ec54bbd5ee29d13797d95ea034615cb38c587eec0db845e76640fb5548f78b)

---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by Andrea Hanks
**First Lady Melania Trump and Queen Rania Al Abdullah of the Hashemite Kingdom of Jordan** | June 25, 2018

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0096664701b321fb49804adbe5a782789a67c73399875d3113ccc870986ab847776720a90d6d29cc4b7a575035d82aa05be0fcba44cd21ab) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=0096664701b321fbbe6b50ca081fe44f959ad32ec4a762d1532a27ee5cc6915152e2bb4bd901573bda3fd5a12bac30de66bdb9d61eaf79a9) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4a3f41caab33ce2085b1f938e7a475e83e55189291d7d29c103c37aea8c495d322fd996c1a76552daf00dcafba15388dd1478cddbf83ccdac)

name: Tom Perez
subject: We can't do this in October, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
This is a critical time to invest in Democrats who are ready to win in November and build up our ground game in every corner of the country.
---
Here's the truth, Derek: In order for Democrats to win this year, critical investments have to be made now. Not in September or October -- now.

Saturday is an end-of-quarter fundraising deadline -- and it is the most important one we've faced so far this year.

Meeting this month's fundraising goal could be the difference between victory and defeat in November. That's why I'm asking:

**Will you make your first $3 contribution of 2018 before Saturday's critical end-of-quarter deadline to make sure Democrats have the resources they need to win in November?**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521249/4067b0a/65dd82ef1/7fbf6e62/797291914/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-deadline-2018?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180626_tp_nd&source=em_20180626_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180626_tp_nd")
[DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521249/4067b0a/65dd82ef1/7fbf6e63/797291914/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-deadline-2018?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180626_tp_nd&source=em_20180626_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180626_tp_nd")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521249/4067b0a/65dd82ef1/7fbf6e60/797291914/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-deadline-2018?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180626_tp_nd&source=em_20180626_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180626_tp_nd")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521249/4067b0a/65dd82ef1/7fbf6e61/797291914/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-deadline-2018?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180626_tp_nd&source=em_20180626_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180626_tp_nd")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521249/4067b0a/65dd82ef1/7fbf6e6e/797291914/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-deadline-2018?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180626_tp_nd&source=em_20180626_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180626_tp_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521249/4067b0a/65dd82ef1/7fbf6e6f/797291914/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180626_tp_nd&source=em_20180626_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180626_tp_nd")
** Democrats won't be able to win elections unless we build a strong party infrastructure. It truly comes down to that.

I'm not just talking about national party headquarters -- our state parties are critical, and frankly they're our top priority, so we're working to strengthen them through regular monthly investments and competitive grants to help build innovative programs to mobilize voters. Just this month, we've been able to announce an additional $2.5 million to organize our base constituencies, and many more have already benefited from similar investments.

The DNC is also committed to IWillVote, a national campaign to ensure voters have all the information they need to get to the polls -- whether it's registering and committing to vote or providing voter protection and education. The right to vote is one of our core values as Democrats, and it is our responsibility to help all eligible voters participate in our democracy.

Our goal is not simply to win in November -- it's to build a permanent party infrastructure capable of putting Democrats on the path to victory in 2020 and beyond. That's why your contribution before Saturday's fundraising deadline is so important.

**[Will you donate $3 before Saturday's end-of-quarter deadline to help elect Democrats nationwide?](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521249/4067b0a/65dd82ef1/7fbf6e6d/797291914/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/june-deadline-2018?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+Will+you+donate+3++if+consinConsGroup294&utm_campaign=em_20180626_tp_nd&source=em_20180626_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180626_tp_nd") **

Thank you for your support,

Tom

Tom Perez
Chair
Democratic National Committee

If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, [**submit this form to unsubscribe**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521249/4067b0a/65dd82ef1/7fbf6e6a/797291914/VEsHBQ/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+submit+this+form+to+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em_20180626_tp_nd&source=em_20180626_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180626_tp_nd").

If you'd only like to receive our most important messages, [**sign up to receive less email**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521249/4067b0a/65dd82ef1/7fbf6e6b/797291914/VEsHBA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/less-email-signup?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+sign+up+to+receive+less+email&utm_campaign=em_20180626_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180626_tp_nd").

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't your preferred email address, [**update your contact information**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521249/4067b0a/65dd82ef1/7fbf6e68/797291914/VEsHBw/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/update-info-dnc?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180626_tp_nd&refcode=em_20180626_tp_nd"). If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, [**make a contribution today**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521249/4067b0a/65dd82ef1/7fbf6e69/797291914/VEsHBg/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-email-footer?refcode=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=13+-+make+a+contribution+today&utm_campaign=em_20180626_tp_nd&source=em_20180626_tp_nd"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Just reply to this email to send any comments, criticisms, or feedback. Our community management team reads every message from supporters like you. Thanks for supporting our party!

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www.Democrats.org](www.Democrats.org), and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

amount.](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff963/4462dc26/505970a2/2007bf49/737509106/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIzMjY4MTgzIiwiZTN0emJIVm5mWDA9Ijoic2JlMTgwNjI2YW0iLCJlM3QyWlhKemFXOXVmWDA9IjoibSJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180626am?refcode=sbe180626am_m_other&refcode2=3268183")** Here's the question I've been thinking about in light of Pence's recent visit: What matters to Ohio families? Trump's tweets don't matter much to a cancer patient in Cleveland. She's worried about losing her affordable healthcare if protections for people with pre-existing conditions disappear. She's worried about the price of the prescription drugs keeping her alive. Poll numbers don't matter much to a senior in Toledo. He's worried about making his Social Security check stretch to pay the bills. He's worried about whether Medicare will cover his doctor's visit next week. Headlines don't matter much to steelworkers in Youngstown. They're worried about their jobs moving overseas. They're worried about their hours, their working conditions, and their pensions. Trump and Pence can talk forever. My opponent and his special interest allies can run attack ads until the end of time. I fight like hell to protect hardworking Ohioans. And that's what I'll continue to do. And I'm asking for your help Peter. [**If you can, get your contribution in before midnight.**](https://secure.sherrodbrown.com/page/m/302ff963/4462dc26/505970a2/2007bf4b/737509106/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/sbe180626am?refcode=sbe180626am_m&amount=26") With gratitude, Sherrod

name: West Virginia Democratic Party
subject: Ditch Mitch!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by the WV State Democratic Executive Committee (www
body:
Democrats Launch “Ditch Mitch” Campaign

2018 is about ditching McConnell, Carmichael, and their candidates

CHARLESTON, WV — Today, the Democratic Party of West Virginia announced the release of “Ditch Mitch!” bumper stickers, hats, and several billboards.

_[WATCH: Video announcement from Democratic Party chair Belinda Biafore.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1497248/8084494/-803653937?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmM1ZWIzMy01Mzc5LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=45YVwCTQ1GSHGcSG1il3m2xqgEznVo29t04f-7uAfO8=&v=fVEZh0iEbTs)_

Because U.S. Senate Majority Leader Mitch McConnell and state Senate President Mitch Carmichael have undermined working families, Democrats are working in 2018 to ditch the Mitches and their candidates.

West Virginians want to “Ditch Mitch!” at the federal and state level. The West Virginia Democratic Party is sponsoring billboards across the state to educate voters about the need to ditch the Mitches.

Also, “Ditch Mitch” hats and bumper stickers will now be available.

[CLICK HERE TO SIGN UP FOR A “DITCH MITCH” BUMPER STICKER AND HAT.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1497249/8084495/2025826299?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzgyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNmM1ZWIzMy01Mzc5LWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=45YVwCTQ1GSHGcSG1il3m2xqgEznVo29t04f-7uAfO8=&refcode=launch&amount=10)

“We never thought that we’d agree with Don Blankenship on something, but West Virginians know that it’s time to ditch Mitch McConnell, Mitch Carmichael and their candidates,” said Belinda Biafore, chair of the West Virginia Democratic Party. “McConnell is blocking coal miner pensions and destroying health care, and Carmichael attacked teachers and public employees. It’s time to “Ditch Mitch” at the state and federal level this November.”

###

subject: Still Stronger Together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
Dear Peter,

"We can't solve our problems by building walls and sowing division. We are Stronger Together."

I remember delivering that line during my speech before the Democratic National Convention in 2016. Since then, we have experienced the fallout of a president who has made it his goal to build walls and sow division.

And despite this harsh reality, my faith in the American Dream has never been stronger.

I have seen men and women rise up in greater numbers than ever before in response to the current Administration. I have witnessed average Americans pushing back, resisting the politics of hatred and getting involved. People are donating, volunteering, campaigning, voting, and running for office in record numbers. During these difficult and uncertain times, people are putting their passion for service and dedication to country to work for the good of us all.

People like Abigail Spanberger, a former CIA Officer and proud Democrat running for office in Virginia's 7th Congressional District -- a seat currently held by an out-of-touch House Freedom Caucus member. Like me, Abigail believes that progress can only be attained by breaking down barriers, not erecting them. Like me, Abigail believes in the enduring power of America's founding principles and that our diversity makes us stronger. And unlike her opponent, Abigail is willing to listen to the people of her district and advocate on their behalf in the halls of Congress.

**But she needs your help to get there.[Will you donate to support Abigail's team in their effort to flip the 7th?](https://act.myngp.com/el/q_qTU2RvcyE2xV-nynVYNUU9Q9cc9yXYeY6sYl9Rxwo=/SSjX3N7Tq2fYIv_lXWdLqdPnfOf8aYUw1dFT58UoQkA=?refcode=khizr)**

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/q_qTU2RvcyE2xV-nynVYNUU9Q9cc9yXYeY6sYl9Rxwo=/SSjX3N7Tq2fYIv_lXWdLqdPnfOf8aYUw1dFT58UoQkA=?refcode=khizr)

I am inspired by Abigail's campaign, and I know you will be too. She has what it takes to win the fight that lies ahead, and I am proud to be in her corner.

-Khizr Khan

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/q_qTU2RvcyE2xV-nynVYNUU9Q9cc9yXYeY6sYl9Rxwo=/KG5YR-Cv-F45g8iApR-2-eNbeA2bOs2jCokDl6_3yt4=)

_Abigail Spanberger is a proud Democrat and former CIA officer running for Congress against Dave Brat in Virginia 's 7th Congressional District. She believes in leadership that flows from our shared American values of integrity, responsibility, and decency, and she wants to work to move this country forward together. To learn more, please visit [AbigailSpanberger.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/q_qTU2RvcyE2xV-nynVYNUU9Q9cc9yXYeY6sYl9Rxwo=/sItxaEBdLs3nMN710BVZt_1Ob4BNH3CWgubLQZSmmtE=)_

subject: What President Trump & Nate Silver have in common

body:

This team has really stepped up in the last few days to show the country that we're going to answer President Trump's campaign to target Minnesota loud and clear.

And we're doing it the Minnesota way -- by focusing on finding common ground and getting things done for people.

**But President Trump 's campaign has put a spotlight on our state. In fact, Nate Silver's website _FiveThirtyEight_ just called Minnesota a "state to watch."**

name: Team Beto
subject: Breaking poll shows Beto within single digits of Cruz
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Beto for Texas
body:
#
A brand-new University of Texas/Texas Tribune poll shows Beto within SINGLE DIGITS of Ted Cruz.
Y'all, this is HUGE. Our campaign to take on Ted Cruz is neck-and-neck.
[**We can't afford to fall short of our end-of-quarter goal and lose our momentum. Help Beto reach his June goal of raising $200,000 online and keep up the pressure on Cruz. Now, with just over four months until Election Day, we have to double down and work harder than ever to help Beto's message reach Texans across the state.

Team Beto

name: Austin Petersen
subject: Personal appeal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Austin Petersen for US Senate
body:
| Hi Friend, I spent a lot of time writing this email to you. I would like to make a personal and formal appeal to you. I hope you will take two minutes to read this email and consider donating to the campaign. Allow me to tell you why this is so important: June and July are the two most important months of this campaign. We have reached a pivotal moment and the winds are turning drastically in our favor. Elections are not won the week or two before votes are cast - Voters are making their decisions NOW. The urgency of the election is growing. I must make the case that I am the most conservative and best candidate to defeat Claire McCaskill in November. Voters must learn that Hawley is a fake conservative and not prepared for prime time. We have more volunteers, donors, and Name ID than ever before. We produce earned media and are reaching thousands of voters every day. Next month, I will take the hammer to Josh Hawley’s campaign. Every GOP primary voter in Missouri will know that I am the real conservative and Hawley is a Mitch McConnell puppet. To do this we will run ads online, radio and T.V. to reach everyone possible. So what’s next? I’ll be honest with you. I need you to make your first online donation to the campaign. Friend, I need absolutely everyone onboard. I don’t care if you can donate $5 or $500. I am asking you to donate literally any amount to the campaign. I have put my entire life on hold to run for Senate because I know how incredibly important it is that we fire Claire, and I am ready to serve. I know I can beat her. I’m putting in the work. I just need you to chip in, and I will make you proud. [**It is not enough to be a conservative, libertarian, or simply be correct on the issues. We have to do something about it. We owe it to our philosophy and our principles to win. And victory is impossible without your help.**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.anedot.com%2Faustinpetersen%2Fdonate_tb_today%3Futm_campaign%3D062618_nondonor%26source_code%3Demail%26email%3Ddpwillis67%40gmail.com%26first_name%3D%26last_name%3D%26street%3D%26zip%3D%26city%3D%26state%3D%26employer%3D%26occupation%3D%26phone%3D&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=062618_nondonor&n=1) Please use one of these links to donate anything you can afford: **[Donate $10 Here>>>](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.anedot.com%2Faustinpetersen%2Fdonate_tb_today%3Futm_campaign%3D062618_nondonor%26source_code%3Demail%26email%3Ddpwillis67%40gmail.com%26first_name%3D%26last_name%3D%26street%3D%26zip%3D%26city%3D%26state%3D%26employer%3D%26occupation%3D%26phone%3D%26amount%3D10&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=062618_nondonor&n=2)

[**Donate Any Amount Here >>>**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.anedot.com%2Faustinpetersen%2Fdonate_tb_today%3Futm_campaign%3D062618_nondonor%26source_code%3Demail%26email%3Ddpwillis67%40gmail.com%26first_name%3D%26last_name%3D%26street%3D%26zip%3D%26city%3D%26state%3D%26employer%3D%26occupation%3D%26phone%3D&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=062618_nondonor&n=8) Friend, let me tell you something...I am all in. This is a 24/7 job. I will not rest until I pass out each night. My work ethic and team cannot be matched. I am doing everything it takes to win this campaign \- but I need your help, and we need it right now. Please consider making your first donation to the campaign today. Let it not be said we did nothing to restore our Republic. Thank you, Austin Petersen P.S. I am setting an ambitious goal this month. I would like to find 1,500 online donors before the end of the month. I know that’s a lot. But I am confident we can reach it. We need to. [**Please become one of those first donors. Even $5, $10, or $50 helps. You can donate by clicking here.**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.anedot.com%2Faustinpetersen%2Fdonate_tb_today%3Futm_campaign%3D062618_nondonor%26source_code%3Demail%26email%3Ddpwillis67%40gmail.com%26first_name%3D%26last_name%3D%26street%3D%26zip%3D%26city%3D%26state%3D%26employer%3D%26occupation%3D%26phone%3D&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=062618_nondonor&n=9)

name: Team Gonzalez
subject: Celebrate 4th of July with Team Gonzalez!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Anthony Gonzalez for Congress
body:
We will be walking in two upcoming parades in both Cuyahoga and Wayne County! See below for more information. We look forward to you joining us!
**Celebrate 4** th**of July with Team Gonzalez!**
We will be walking in two upcoming parades in both Cuyahoga and Wayne County! See below for more information. We look forward to you joining us!
_**Orrville 4 th of July Parade**_
Tuesday, July 3rd
Lineup begins at 5:00 PM, parade kicks off at 7:00 PM
We will be lining up on Mineral Spring Street at the north drive of the Orrville High School Football Stadium
We will be walking with the Wayne County Republican Party
_**Westlake 4 th of July Parade**_
Wednesday, July 4th
Lineup begins at 9:30 AM, parade kicks off at 10:00 AM
We will be meeting at the St. Peter & George Coptic Orthodox Church
25800 Hilliard Blvd Westlake, OH 44145
_*Candy and Anthony Gonzalez for U.S. Congress t-shirts will be distributed upon arrival._

For more information or to sign up to walk with Team Gonzalez please contact Josette Burns, [josette@votegonzalez.com](mailto:josette@votegonzalez.com) or 734-548-0824.

Paid for by Anthony Gonzalez for Congress
---

This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.voteanthonygonzalez.com/e/eh?_t=f6da7e3d3139421987765744f5cc4aea&_m=0768d948b49b441d8d8dbb10bb700672&_e=GO8bi0I2C6G70iZ6CLNjCHYH44-SQC8egU5jX1g2Fq3xxgSfgPv58fOKjSEnvgVd7MDMkP2prkkyeGwFR229Rm91HhSf7wpBW_a49jxnTT6epf3DijMBwL54X20fNxvcpolYLuQ1HTQs1UDC0f4y8Xo22LciAOSLwfOE4tMnOkE9_QpLo0rus8t-8Ag6GM0tB56V90yeu_nzfSvf4zZjw7Rp4V1775RklyI8or0v8t0aYZt4OUe4boy5DcVeCGUQ). It’s great to have you on my team, Friend! This is your campaign, so I want to hear from you. On this team, you call the plays. So tell me, [what are you fighting for?](http://links.voteanthonygonzalez.com/u/click?_t=f6da7e3d3139421987765744f5cc4aea&_m=0768d948b49b441d8d8dbb10bb700672&_e=OserwtrFfibVfHgSCd-M0f_rBVqXTqVAOedh9zJRwXoKYzUToHpSecaqlOaMJgdqqSaZP2ZjjEA5quJQGIdghxHWFKzutLRImie8CINQC0sGHJ3M5uDDxKEc-930FtzuZHZXTNbbPL1LDvxScw526M928CPcSYHiAQ8Mt-b7xlyhF44pVyJGIpeIvNidOfD3T8LY9WQvOiEn2KNLN4y8DLn2Ha8HQ4eV4cf1FCyJ7KHpklFSmTfX46-Ii3hVRwsgEE-bNX7xBV9n5iheoMLlxlXjnRj6ZySz6x71ZxpKc00lDNhhclEu3pj_Xqsh60rWJbXDdbv_bsQvhqTDariJ6NDjt3H4lDnoHpyRGv_vtWETq6r59QOThxW36XaCUnzkRqFexJOSU8wQrZxq6imO8h3zflQwBzYnmp1UQ4t7S1M%3D) I’m fighting for my home, for the people of Northeast Ohio who are being left behind by a lagging economy and subpar education. Simply put, we’re stuck. Our politicians are more divided than ever. Watching them try to legislate is worse than listening to an out-of-towner try to pronounce “Cuyahoga.” If you agree with me, I’m asking you to help us put this one in the end zone. The first step is following our campaign on [Twitter](http://links.voteanthonygonzalez.com/u/click?_t=f6da7e3d3139421987765744f5cc4aea&_m=0768d948b49b441d8d8dbb10bb700672&_e=V_eUCjE0AsXEScPzycMiE3hRxD6kv1PIEOb2oaAbW_l9fpEYOYgPWMQl3H-lCP1MEQz1sdBf1pQbs0_i96iCdku1uxHVdY_8QE-XN9EmKiGGp5W4MZFIAcrpFoIxySzSjPPt9sEoGpqdFkI2oxVZ44BCW-s_RNoxdveWiGXXZqLJ9VuP1rxKCzqxEylCodPdEK7HNyG53B6OMvfaZ-_RAPKTpQfV_7DsP2RL329mwyYGB7Y6ULYdsktkaZ1df9KitRQEPKYJHmrgYboyenFSWw%3D%3D) and liking us on [Facebook](http://links.voteanthonygonzalez.com/u/click?_t=f6da7e3d3139421987765744f5cc4aea&_m=0768d948b49b441d8d8dbb10bb700672&_e=V_eUCjE0AsXEScPzycMiEzIF_FWcuaORtyxwgMNLikqx9jz0leLJHd7_BUpo7X0X4x7yTyzI-KBEiFV5CE1Q8tVrEvwzT5OTHUcAeZTLIqtG86nI7Wwqe_4G-ytfhTkCKkqeoThPeHr3uDhJ2PoDXpK0tJ0-AEOm_KfnBGtSGUZyaSGXVN4n6BtCB6WiBKQJus2Qhy41Oh466IU9nuxkV6Hyg8aHOCFUeeBqtu_zPCGnTA49XcWpeVTbSLcyle_cR_3DC6JzL_5LEL7cpoITiBiMj8Y_BdGATxIXy3NHsX0%3D). Looking to do more? You can sign up to volunteer with my campaign [here](http://links.voteanthonygonzalez.com/u/click?_t=f6da7e3d3139421987765744f5cc4aea&_m=0768d948b49b441d8d8dbb10bb700672&_e=OserwtrFfibVfHgSCd-M0f_rBVqXTqVAOedh9zJRwXr3vtWNGvQv8nXaaCXJjXQ45oz3TAMFzqxxYxeGzrbZV5Yx7dQDfLvOvmSezYh7xI-0qw5wBWJtrQ66RCRe7YRyfymvH5tvJsjAh9KSFR6dofYXl5223yQ5OM8ygrOTVfn4EKk81AAQt4G4t_mkI5FczuWJlh0tME6Y-85OiK5lWZD_t-MJm369qxHc-a380NotgJV3Kp-5kLEcyRyDuj_sCOsPlJRdHusZQ5Ia-wZO17aWiMVL5g9NIIH5l011hbB0cHx_X23fFjAlHPEcdSjbogNxvHxJErXtFcfOF3ine2HtLmjS1lUkAsNmX9DZq28uGaUKJ7AD1xokZ_WxkzSw9ZwRFlZNGgclftKexjMXCaQoLu5EQZIomsb6LHyjQHk%3D). But like I said, you call the plays, so I want to know what you think. Are my emails not making the cut? If you want to pull back, I understand, but don’t retire your jersey! You can choose which emails you receive by clicking [here](http://links.voteanthonygonzalez.com/e/eh?_t=f6da7e3d3139421987765744f5cc4aea&_m=0768d948b49b441d8d8dbb10bb700672&_e=GO8bi0I2C6G70iZ6CLNjCHYH44-SQC8egU5jX1g2Fq3xxgSfgPv58fOKjSEnvgVd7MDMkP2prkkyeGwFR229Rm91HhSf7wpBW_a49jxnTT6epf3DijMBwL54X20fNxvcpolYLuQ1HTQs1UDC0f4y8Xo22LciAOSLwfOE4tMnOkE9_QpLo0rus8t-8Ag6GM0tB56V90yeu_nzfSvf4zZjw7Rp4V1775RklyI8or0v8t0aYZt4OUe4boy5DcVeCGUQ), and you can unsubscribe [here](http://links.voteanthonygonzalez.com/e/eh?_t=f6da7e3d3139421987765744f5cc4aea&_m=0768d948b49b441d8d8dbb10bb700672&_e=GO8bi0I2C6G70iZ6CLNjCHYH44-SQC8egU5jX1g2Fq3xxgSfgPv58fOKjSEnvgVd7MDMkP2prkkyeGwFR229Rm91HhSf7wpBW_a49jxnTT6epf3DijMBwL54X20fNxvcpolYLuQ1HTQs1UDC0f4y8Xo22LciAOSLwfOE4tMnOkE9_QpLo0rus8t-8Ag6GM0tB56V90yeu_nzfSvf4zZjw7Rp4V1775RklyI8or0v8t0aYZt4OUe4boy5DcVeCGUQ). name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20Scott?=
subject: STATEMENT: GOVERNOR PHIL SCOTT ON LEGISLATURE’S LATEST BUDGET
body:
| | |
---
[View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/philscott/budgetstatement?e=19cebfe173)
---
| |
---
| **STATEMENT: GOVERNOR PHIL SCOTT ON LEGISLATURE’S LATEST BUDGET**
** ** Governor Phil Scott made the decision last night that he would allow the Legislature’s latest budget to become law without his signature. Here’s what the Governor wanted Vermonters to know about that decision.

“**In my first 18 months in office, we’ve avoided $70 million in forecasted property tax rate increases **– including two consecutive years of level rates for residential property tax payers. We’ve eliminated the income tax on social security for low and middle-income households. And I’ve held the line against many other taxes and fees proposed by the Legislature.

“We’ve invested to make childcare, early education and higher education opportunities more affordable and taken critical steps towards improving the efficiency of our K-12 system – including establishing a statewide health benefit for school employees; reforming the special education delivery system; and creating a task force to improve Vermont’s staff-to-student ratios.

“We’ve also reduced unemployment insurance and workers’ compensation costs, saving employers tens of millions of dollars, among other accomplishments.

“**Most importantly, we’ve ensured that our state budget is no longer growing faster than wages. For the first time in decades, state government is helping Vermonters keep more of what they earn.**

“Because of the hard work of Vermont’s job creators, supported by our focus on policies that grow our economy and make Vermont more affordable, [there are nearly 4,000 more Vermonters in the workforce than when I took office](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=e06905b303&e=19cebfe173), wages are rising and the economy is accelerating, leading to a state budget surplus for the first time in many years and declines in human service caseloads.

“**Despite all this progress and a budget surplus that has grown above $55 million in recent weeks, Legislative leaders are insisting on raising non-residential property tax rates by 4.5-cents this year. And despite multiple paths offered by my Administration and a bipartisan group of lawmakers, it’s clear majority leaders are willing to threaten a shutdown of state government, just to unnecessarily raise tax rates.**

“**On Friday, I had an agreement** with House Speaker Mitzi Johnson and Minority Leader Don Turner that would prevent a government shutdown while achieving a second consecutive year of level rates for residential taxpayers and providing 100 percent of the rate relief for non-residential payers over two years. This agreement achieved goals of both my Administration and the Legislature.

“**Unfortunately, majority party leadership walked away from this deal** and an additional compromise that had broad bipartisan support late Friday night. By abandoning two agreed-upon compromises and rejecting multiple proposals to fund government beyond July 1, legislative leaders have now pushed us to the brink of a shutdown, just to unnecessarily raise tax rates on non-residential property tax payers, which includes renters, small business owners, camp owners and more.

“**As Governor, I will not put the health and safety of Vermonters or the stability of our economy at risk. While I do not support raising any tax rates in a year we have a $55 million surplus, this debate has gone as far as it can responsibly go. **I’m left with no choice but to allow this bill to become law without my signature. Make no mistake, however, that I will be fighting to address these tax rates, and others, in the future – especially as our economy and our surplus continue to grow.

“I am frustrated, and disappointed for Vermonters, that Democrats in the House and Senate have forced through a non-residential tax rate increase in a year we have a growing surplus. But, **I’m pleased to have achieved about 75 percent of the property tax rate relief I fought for this year** , including a second consecutive year of level statewide rates for residential payers. **Legislators can expect that I will seek to achieve additional tax relief for Vermonters next year, and beyond** , because there is much more work to do to make Vermont more affordable and prosperous for families and businesses.

“As we move ahead, I look forward to working with fiscally responsible lawmakers of all parties who understand the toll the tax burden takes on our economy and economic development. And I will continue to fight to make Vermont more affordable while investing in pro-growth policies that expand our workforce, strengthen our economy and protect the most vulnerable.”
###
---

Have you voted?

| [](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a673/7ab0e2c4/7feff93d/349b983f/1655430166/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-primary-voters?refcode=OHQ06268A") Friend, Election Days are funny as a candidate. You've done all the work -- you've secured endorsements from teachers and nurses, made it clear that health care is a human right, and demanded an end to mass incarceration in Maryland -- but Election Day comes and all you can do is wait. I'll be keeping busy today, but I can't lie: I have some nerves. So I have to ask -- have you voted yet? | [YES, I VOTED!](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a673/7ab0e2c4/7feff93d/349b983f/1655430166/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-primary-voters?refcode=OHQ06268A")
---
[NO, NOT YET](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a673/7ab0e2c4/7feff93d/349b983e/1655430166/VEsF/ "https://voterservices.elections.maryland.gov/PollingPlaceSearch")
---
It just helps my nerves to know where we are, you know? After a year of building the broad, diverse coalition this campaign has become, after pushing forward to make sure that the voices of working families are heard, I wanted to make sure that you'd voted.
Polls are open in Maryland until 8:00 p.m. -- I hope I will have some good news to share later tonight.
Thanks for everything,
Ben

[CHIP IN »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37a673/7ab0e2c4/7feff93d/349b9839/1655430166/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bj-st5-18?refcode=OHQ06268A")
---

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: WSJ: The Moral Logic of School Choice
body:
Dear Friend,

I hope you will take the time to read my recent article on school choice in the Wall Street Journal. As always, please let me know your thoughts.
Bobby
* * *
**The Moral Logic of School Choice**
_The U.S. broadly respects parental rights—except with regard to schooling._

The Wall Street Journal
Bobby Jindal
Proponents of school choice offer many arguments for charter authorizations, vouchers and education tax credits. For parents, the reasons are often straightforward. Some cite better discipline, dress codes and an emphasis on teaching their traditional or religious values. Others mention plentiful school supplies, increased personal attention or a shorter commute to school.

Policy analysts may point to better test scores, as well as higher graduation and retention rates, than at the underperforming public schools students would otherwise attend. They believe increased competition for pupils and dollars would force public schools to improve, benefiting everyone. Fiscal hawks may add that charter, parochial and private schools spend government dollars more efficiently, or that a one-size-fits-all education system is as antiquated as Model T production.

More than a few social-justice warriors argue that affluent parents already have de facto school choice, since they can afford private schools or expensive homes in strong public districts. Children from poor and minority communities, therefore, disproportionately benefit from initiatives to expand school choice.

**[Read more...](http://wc4.net/t?r=4673&c=6681&l=203&ctl=19B0D:C15079EF2606CA7C4CED8596735DB256696548644412C47B&)**

* * *

[Unsubscribe](http://wc4.net/u?id=C15079EF2606CA7C4CED8596735DB256696548644412C47B)
---

name: Cecile Richards
subject: She's falling behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
Conservatives believe this moment is their best chance in a generation to overturn Roe vs. Wade. | [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b13e/c1f7015/6be31e3d/1142fac9/2441566699/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june_eoq-cecile?refcode=rtw_20180626_em-full") Friends- Conservatives believe this moment is their best chance in a generation to overturn _Roe vs. Wade_. **An ultra-conservative Supreme Court, a President who will sign any anti-choice legislation, and a Congress that is desperate to give their base a victory. This is what we are up against.** The only firewall we have in Washington is a strong group of pro-choice women in the U.S. Senate -- and now one of them needs our help. **Tina Smith is facing the biggest fundraising deadline of her campaign in just 4 days -- and is falling behind her goal.** **[Extremist politicians who want to control women's private medical decisions in Washington are desperately trying to make sure we don't elect a true champion of reproductive freedom to the Senate -- will you step up and help close the gap before her big filing deadline this week? Make a contribution of $5 or more now.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b13e/c1f7015/6be31e3d/1142faca/2441566699/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june_eoq-cecile?refcode=rtw_20180626_em-full-nd")** I've known Tina for over a decade. In fact, she is the first U.S. Senator to have worked at Planned Parenthood. So I say this with confidence: Tina strongly defends a woman's right to access the full range of reproductive health care. And let's be clear: Republicans like Ted Cruz and Mitch McConnell are doing everything in their power to silence voices like Tina's in the Senate. They will make sure every special interest dollar they can find floods into Minnesota to win this U.S. Senate seat. **So here 's your choice, friend -- make a contribution so Tina can hit her goal, build a winning campaign, and continue defending our rights in the Senate... or sit back and watch another anti-choice politician take us backward.** **[Make your first contribution of $5 or more before Tina's end-of-quarter deadline as a way of saying enough with the attacks on women's health. Every dollar helps elect a strong, pro-choice woman to the U.S. Senate.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b13e/c1f7015/6be31e3d/1142faca/2441566699/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june_eoq-cecile?refcode=rtw_20180626_em-full-nd")** Thank you for being in this fight with me, Cecile Richards **[Contribute](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4b13e/c1f7015/6be31e3d/1142facd/2441566699/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-june_eoq-cecile?refcode=rtw_20180626_em-full-nd&amount=25")**

name: Paul Davis
subject: Peter, are you ready to fight?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Paul Davis for Kansas
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/4M-_88zOXoxwKkIWyMY2ljP8dB5YMR-zgLTgYPBIvqs=/2tVrO4zFuvKsUWJ2pTr-BvvvIVDXviduoNQln2PDooU=?gpsid=13_36_1576&refcode=em18_180626_EOQ2_fnd_gq_ful__PD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180626_EOQ2_fnd_gq_ful__PD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)
Dear Peter,

Can you believe there are less than 5 months until November's election?

We've been working hard every day to prepare, but to be honest, I can't believe we're this close! There's still a lot of work left to be done before we head to the voting booth, and right now is our key time to build up all of the resources we need to win.

**[Peter, this end-of-quarter deadline is the most important one that we've faced so far. Will you help us go above and beyond what we need to win by chipping in now?](https://act.myngp.com/el/4M-_88zOXoxwKkIWyMY2ljP8dB5YMR-zgLTgYPBIvqs=/2tVrO4zFuvKsUWJ2pTr-BvvvIVDXviduoNQln2PDooU=?gpsid=13_36_1576&refcode=em18_180626_EOQ2_fnd_gq_ful__PD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180626_EOQ2_fnd_gq_ful__PD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)**

I'm ready to fight for Kansas and stand up for hardworking families against politicians who would rather put their special interest donors first. But those donors are already promising to spend millions on attack ads to try and defeat me.

**[I don't know about you, but I'm up for a fight -- and it starts right now. Help us build the resources we need to share our message and counter the attacks coming our way. Chip in now.](https://act.myngp.com/el/4M-_88zOXoxwKkIWyMY2ljP8dB5YMR-zgLTgYPBIvqs=/2tVrO4zFuvKsUWJ2pTr-BvvvIVDXviduoNQln2PDooU=?gpsid=13_36_1576&refcode=em18_180626_EOQ2_fnd_gq_ful__PD_ettx&utm_campaign=em18_180626_EOQ2_fnd_gq_ful__PD_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=pauda)**

Thank you,

Paul Davis

name: Steve Scalise
subject: Stronger with your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Fellow American, The last time the Democrats had a wave election was in 2006.
The economy was trending down. The liberal base was energized. Most importantly, they were out raising us at a large scale. That’s how we ended up with Nancy Pelosi the first time.
The economy is booming, but the last two requirements for a Democratic Wave are still ever present.
Just last month, Pelosi raised a historic 11.3 million in one month. ONE MONTH! We need to make a huge comeback right now to stand a chance.
History CANNOT repeat itself. If it does, we can kiss our success goodbye and welcome Pelosi as speaker once again.
Fellow American, we are coming up on an important deadline: **the FEC Quarterly Deadline.** We must have everyone involved to avoid another Democratic Wave from happening this election cycle.

name: Mark Osmack Democrat for Congress
subject: Re: Take action on immigration reform
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Osmack for Missouri
body:
Stand up for a fair immigration system.
---
| | | | | |
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yGPidt8_rVfeXYKXp7I3sduhse1-Ytcie25g21qTqdEa87FoLKir9fzrLtF316LaAtAYcstuxLmS2GHKFVM72l2I3aLwKmJKoIng5d4uYYeLSK_8V-bV77W1dLjwazKvIm05P0FgL7muk8kxrUwhiehSnnAe9Jtn5_2nFulpEmzTL576blkRc3tZMaN7GFUP8sLpM_sQK6M=&c=KMI_AVnGQSXpzXdegd8IUg5IDMbZhBOHv3WRXH3BbZlTYcpu5ET25Q==&ch=6UIXyVOr9rTcjhT8cGB6I4LRPyKk_Or4cZSVJ_vdrFcs85TjMi8PrA==)
---
| President Trump's executive order to end family separation at the southern border doesn't fix our broken immigration system. Detaining children and those seeking asylum in our country isn't right. We need solutions that work for our economy and respect human rights-- now and for the future.
Despite constant misinformation that immigrants are a drag on public resources, the fact is that the U.S. is a nation of immigrants, and immigrants are more likely to start businesses--and less likely to commit crimes--than their non-immigrant neighbors. The hate and scapegoating must stop.
We must have the courage to enact policies that keep our nation a land of opportunity:
* Improving our capacity to process asylum requests so that no one's safety and security sits in limbo waiting for a fair hearing
* Comprehensive immigration reform that includes a path to citizenship

I will stand up for people working to build a better life in the U.S. by working with both parties on a permanent fix for Dreamers, asylum seekers, and families.
To enact long-term, sustainable immigration solutions, we must elect leaders to Congress who have the courage to act on tough issues. I pledge to be that leader. Join me by taking action:

name: Zephyr Teachout
subject: Will you give me a chance to explain?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Zephyr for NY
body:
I would not ask if it were not important.
#

Peter -
In just a moment, I am going to ask you to make a donation to our campaign for Attorney General. I hope you'll give me a chance to explain why this request is so important:
In this race, we're up against the political and financial establishment. Albany and Wall Street have their hand-picked candidates, and they're likely going to have unlimited sums of money from big donors and corporate interests to try to stop us.
That's not how we're funding this race. The overwhelming majority of our donations come from supporters like you giving small amounts of money in response to emails like this. I am very proud of that fact.
Now let me be clear: I have no doubt that we can win. But I cannot do it alone. Our only chance is if we are in this together.
So here's where I ask:
**[Peter, can I count on you to make your first online donation today? Any amount-- even $5 -- is important because this isn't just about how much we raise, but it's about how many people like you chip in to help us grow our movement. I would not ask if it were not important.](https://go.zephyrforny.com/page/m/4d780e6a/6e822e2f/1b2e4dca/417263f6/2991353018/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xODA2MjYtZnVsbCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/zephyr-explain?refcode=em180626-full")**
We know that there are powerful people who are willing to spend whatever it takes to stop me from becoming New York's next Attorney General. That's to be expected when you run a campaign that seeks to take power back from corrupt elites for the people.
But I want to be clear: I believe in the power of the people. That's why I know that, if you are with us, we will win.
Thank you for everything you do.
Best,
Zephyr

name: Battleground Alert
subject: GOP Poll: Donnelly can win, if turnout improves
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
Here's the thing: we know we have enough support to win, but without a presidential race to drive turnout, we could still fall short if our supporters don't show up at the polls. |
---

| | | [](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e30/7377f838/3cebfb2d/51f9da26/3835179050/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIyMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-goppoll?refcode=20180626.1&amount=20")
---
**_[Chip in to our Turnout Fund so we can get those numbers up and WIN in November>>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e30/7377f838/3cebfb2d/51f9da26/3835179050/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIyMCJ9/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-goppoll?refcode=20180626.1&amount=20")_**
Good news and bad news, Peter. A new GOP poll shows victory is within reach for Joe. But there's something making us nervous: **_VOTER TURNOUT IN THE PRIMARY WAS LESS THAN 20%_** \-- and we can't win if that's what turnout looks like in November. We have to work harder than ever to get out the vote and beat extreme Republican Rep. Mike Braun in November!

We've always known this race would be close -- _really_ close. It's why **the GOP brought out their big guns and sent Donald Trump and Mike Pence to campaign with Rep. Braun, and it 's why Mitch McConnell's super PAC is flooding Indiana's airwaves with attacks on Indiana's Democratic senator!**

**Here 's the thing: we know we have enough support to win, but without a presidential race to drive turnout, we could still fall short if our supporters don't show up at the polls. We need the resources to turn them out in force in November: Democrats, independents, and the Republicans who support Joe! Will you rush a donation to the Turnout Fund so we can re-elect Indiana's Democratic senator and beat Republican extremist Rep. Mike Braun on Election Day?**

name: Xochitl Hinojosa
subject: BREAKING: SCOTUS upholds Trump's Muslim ban
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www
body:
The Supreme Court upheld Trump's Muslim ban, Derek. Fight back now by helping regain a Democratic Senate majority ->
---
Earlier today, the Supreme Court upheld Donald Trump's Muslim ban in a 5-4 decision decided by the Court's conservative majority.

First, let's call this ban what it is, Derek: It is an outright attack on the Muslim community that violates our nation's commitment to liberty and justice. Not only does the ban violate our values -- it also makes us less safe and threatens our position as a beacon of freedom for the world.

This isn't the only terrible Supreme Court ruling that has come down recently. In June alone, this conservative court allowed Ohio to suppress votes by purging its voter rolls, upheld gerrymandering in Texas, and allowed anti-choice "crisis pregnancy centers" to continue lying to women in California.

**Let's not forget: All of these 5-4 decisions are happening because, in 2016, Republicans used their Senate majority to block President Obama from appointing Merrick Garland to the Supreme Court.** They stole a Supreme Court seat from President Obama -- and if we let them win this November, Republicans could seal a conservative majority on the Supreme Court for decades. We need to do everything we can to regain a Democratic majority in the Senate, and we need to do it NOW. So I'm asking:

**Will you fight back now and chip in $3 to elect Democrats nationwide? Taking back the Senate in 2018 and the White House in 2020 is the only way to take back our judiciary from conservative extremists.**

**[ DONATE: $3](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521252/4067b0a/65c17904e/7fbf1b03/1907526950/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/scotus-muslim-ban?amount=3&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE+3&utm_campaign=em_20180626_xh_nd&source=em_20180626_xh_nd&refcode=em_20180626_xh_nd")
[DONATE: $10](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521252/4067b0a/65c17904e/7fbf1b00/1907526950/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/scotus-muslim-ban?amount=10&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+10&utm_campaign=em_20180626_xh_nd&source=em_20180626_xh_nd&refcode=em_20180626_xh_nd")
[DONATE: $25](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521252/4067b0a/65c17904e/7fbf1b01/1907526950/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/scotus-muslim-ban?amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+25&utm_campaign=em_20180626_xh_nd&source=em_20180626_xh_nd&refcode=em_20180626_xh_nd")
[DONATE: $50](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521252/4067b0a/65c17904e/7fbf1b0e/1907526950/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/scotus-muslim-ban?amount=50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=em_20180626_xh_nd&source=em_20180626_xh_nd&refcode=em_20180626_xh_nd")
[DONATE: $100](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521252/4067b0a/65c17904e/7fbf1b0f/1907526950/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/scotus-muslim-ban?amount=100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=5+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=em_20180626_xh_nd&source=em_20180626_xh_nd&refcode=em_20180626_xh_nd")
[Or donate another amount.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521252/4067b0a/65c17904e/7fbf1b0c/1907526950/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/scotus-muslim-ban?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=6+-+Or+donate+another+amount&utm_campaign=em_20180626_xh_nd&source=em_20180626_xh_nd&refcode=em_20180626_xh_nd")
** Today's Supreme Court decision is an assault on our most fundamental values -- and it's truly a critical time to stand up and fight back for what we believe in. The most effective way to do that is by helping Democrats take back the Senate so we can protect our nation's highest court from becoming overrun by more extreme conservatives.

There are 10 Democratic senators up for re-election in states that Trump won -- and they need our help to defend their seats in the Senate. If we hold those seats, and then win a few races like Beto O'Rourke's in Texas and Jacky Rosen's in Nevada, we could flip the Senate and take away Trump's rubber stamp to appoint whoever he wants to the federal judiciary.

**[Stand with Democrats now and chip in $3 to help regain a majority in the Senate to stand up to Trump.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521252/4067b0a/65c17904e/7fbf1b0d/1907526950/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/scotus-muslim-ban?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=7+-+Stand+with+Democrats+now+and+chip+in+3+t&utm_campaign=em_20180626_xh_nd&source=em_20180626_xh_nd&refcode=em_20180626_xh_nd")**

The Muslim ban attacks the very core of who we are as a country and upholding it is an affront to our values. Thanks for fighting back today.

Xochitl

Xochitl Hinojosa
Communications Director
Democratic National Committee

P.S. Donald Trump stacking our federal court system with conservative extremists could be the most lasting -- and damaging -- part of his legacy. We must elect more Democrats in the Senate to stand up against his judicial nominees -- **[chip in $3 before Saturday's fundraising deadline to fight back.](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521252/4067b0a/65c17904e/7fbf1b0a/1907526950/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/scotus-muslim-ban?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=8+-+chip+in+3+before+Saturdays+fundraising+d&utm_campaign=em_20180626_xh_nd&source=em_20180626_xh_nd&refcode=em_20180626_xh_nd")**

If you no longer wish to receive emails from the DNC, [**submit this form to unsubscribe**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521252/4067b0a/65c17904e/7fbf1b0b/1907526950/VEsP/ "http://www.democrats.org/unsubscribe?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=9+-+submit+this+form+to+unsubscribe&utm_campaign=em_20180626_xh_nd&source=em_20180626_xh_nd&refcode=em_20180626_xh_nd").

If you'd only like to receive our most important messages, [**sign up to receive less email**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521252/4067b0a/65c17904e/7fbf1b08/1907526950/VEsHBQ/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/less-email-signup?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=10+-+sign+up+to+receive+less+email&utm_campaign=em_20180626_xh_nd&refcode=em_20180626_xh_nd").

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't your preferred email address, [**update your contact information**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521252/4067b0a/65c17904e/7fbf1b09/1907526950/VEsHBA/ "https://my.democrats.org/page/s/update-info-dnc?source=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=11+-+update+your+contact+information&utm_campaign=em_20180626_xh_nd&refcode=em_20180626_xh_nd"). If you're ready to elect Democrats in all 50 states, [**make a contribution today**](https://my.democrats.org/page/m/40521252/4067b0a/65c17904e/7fbf1b16/1907526950/VEsHBw/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dnc-email-footer?refcode=email_footer&utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=12+-+make+a+contribution+today&utm_campaign=em_20180626_xh_nd&source=em_20180626_xh_nd"). This organization is powered by you, and we'd love to hear your ideas. Just reply to this email to send any comments, criticisms, or feedback. Our community management team reads every message from supporters like you. Thanks for supporting our party!

Contributions or gifts to the Democratic National Committee are not tax deductible. Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, [www.Democrats.org](www.Democrats.org), and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Stephanie Schriock, EMILY's List
subject: What the Supreme Court said about women's health care today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILY's List [www
body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c408c/24c69fd9/197877b9f/1883cc7a/1406304418/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFER28N_digital_email_20180626_NIFLA_inact&source=WQEFER28N_digital_email_20180626_NIFLA_inact")
---

Peter,

The Supreme Court just ruled to let anti-choice extremists keep lying to patients about their health care.

This morning, the justices released their 5-4 ruling on an abortion rights case: _NIFLA v. Becerra._

To sum it up: Ruling in favor of NIFLA is _really bad_ news for women.

But at EMILY's List, when the right to choose is under attack -- we don't give up. We fight back.

**[Donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women who will keep fighting against anti-choice lies that harm patients.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c408c/24c69fd9/197877b9f/1883cc7b/1406304418/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180626_email_NIFLA?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+elect+prochoice+Democra&utm_campaign=WQEFER28N_digital_email_20180626_NIFLA_inact&source=WQEFER28N_digital_email_20180626_NIFLA_inact")**

_NIFLA v. Becerra_ is about fake women's health centers that take advantage of people who are weighing their reproductive options by posing as legitimate health clinics to lure patients in. Then, using lies and manipulation, they attempt to shame and dissuade patients from seeking abortions.

In 2015, California passed a law which required all clinics that provide services like ultrasounds or pregnancy tests to display information about abortion and contraceptive services. It also required that all unlicensed facilities must disclose that they are not in fact medically certified.

Of course, the fake women's health centers didn't like that. So they sued. And the case made its way up to the highest court, who decided today that these fake women's health centers could continue their nefarious and harmful behavior.

Unfortunately, there are more than 2,700 of them across the country, and in several states, they're even funded by taxpayer money.

But we can fight back.

We can elect women to state legislatures where they can set budgets, to governor's seats where they can veto terrible anti-choice bills, and to the Senate where they can vote on Supreme Court justices.

**Donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight anti-choice extremism and protect reproductive freedom:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Stop-The-Lies](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c408c/24c69fd9/197877b9f/1883cc74/1406304418/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180626_email_NIFLA?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgStopTheLies&utm_campaign=WQEFER28N_digital_email_20180626_NIFLA_inact&source=WQEFER28N_digital_email_20180626_NIFLA_inact")**

Thank you,

Stephanie Schriock
President, EMILY's List

[](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c408c/24c69fd9/197877b9f/1883cc75/1406304418/VEsC/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180626_email_NIFLA?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=4&utm_campaign=WQEFER28N_digital_email_20180626_NIFLA_inact&source=WQEFER28N_digital_email_20180626_NIFLA_inact")

|
# EMILY's List is a community of over five million members that helps elect pro-choice Democratic women to office.

name: Laura
subject: what Trump said
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
**President Trump: You don't want Jacky Rosen as your Senator
[Disagree? Donate $5 now to help us turn Nevada blue!](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd6c5/4fbb2af3/7ef053fe/5e8bf820/373209053/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azgwMC1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk800-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**[** >>**](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd6c5/4fbb2af3/7ef053fe/5e8bf820/373209053/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azgwMC1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk800-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
Everyone - Donald Trump just came to Nevada, where he:

• Lied about Jacky, directly attacked her, and gave her a childish nickname
• Said Senator Heller is "rock solid" and pushed Nevadans to re-elect him instead
• Fundraised for Heller at an exclusive, $25,000 per person fundraiser

So one thing is clear: there are _huge_ sums of GOP money lined up, ready to smear Jacky and prop up their reliable rubber stamp. This is where you come in, team:

[**Saturday marks our CRITICAL end-of-quarter FEC deadline, and we need to hit our $50,000 goal to make up the gap in our budget - donate $5 or whatever you can right now.**](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd6c5/4fbb2af3/7ef053fe/5e8bf820/373209053/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azgwMC1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk800-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
Dean Heller is the most vulnerable Republican Senator in the country this year - but recent polls show our race is neck and neck. With POLITICO saying that "Democrats have almost no shot at winning back the Senate majority if Jacky Rosen can't defeat Sen. Dean Heller," missing this goal is NOT an option.

[**Please, if you DO want to see Jacky as Nevada 's next Senator, step up now with $5, or whatever you can afford, before our biggest FEC deadline of the entire campaign so far. Anything you can give goes directly towards repealing and replacing Dean Heller - and taking the Senate back for Democrats.**](https://secure.rosenfornevada.com/page/m/409dd6c5/4fbb2af3/7ef053fe/5e8bf820/373209053/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoianJfZnItZW1haWwiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6Imp0azgwMC1mci1uZCIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiI1LDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAsNTAwIn0=/ "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/jr_fr-email?refcode=jtk800-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")
Thank you,

Laura
Digital Director

**Rosen for Nevada
PO BOX 27195
LAS VEGAS, NV 89126**

| Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
---
Jacky Rosen is a Democrat running for U.S. Senate in Nevada - our best chance to flip a red seat blue and take back the Senate. We're working hard each day to elect her so she can fight for affordable health care, a cleaner environment, better education and more. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of our grassroots network. Please add us to your address book to make sure you keep receiving updates.

clean_body: President Trump: You don't want Jacky Rosen as your Senator "" "" Everyone - Donald Trump just came to Nevada, where he: • Lied about Jacky, directly attacked her, and gave her a childish nickname • Said Senator Heller is "rock solid" and pushed Nevadans to re-elect him instead • Fundraised for Heller at an exclusive, $25,000 per person fundraiser So one thing is clear: there are huge sums of GOP money lined up, ready to smear Jacky and prop up their reliable rubber stamp. This is where you come in, team: "" Dean Heller is the most vulnerable Republican Senator in the country this year - but recent polls show our race is neck and neck.
