| | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE June 26th, 2018 Statement Regarding The United States Supreme Court Ruling on President Trump’s Travel Ban "In the third revision of the Travel Ban, the Trump Administration penned a more nuanced version that includes North Korea and Venezuela; therefore, the Supreme Court ruling that it is not a religious ban is technically true. The ban’s language gives the administration the ability to lift countries and add countries if they meet requirements. Congress should follow the status of countries listed to make sure there is accountability with the administration’s choices of countries and not just a list they can change to fit another agenda. However, we have to talk about the fact that certain countries listed on the Travel Ban are in the middle of humanitarian disasters where people in dire situations are seeking refuge. This Travel Ban, along with our Zero Tolerance Border policy, is putting America in a position of denying the chance of life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness to many across the globe who are facing imminent death with no hope. It makes me ashamed of what we have become. Do not let politicians and lawmakers tell you there is no other way, that this is our only option. Do not settle for that. We can protect our borders and also be a beacon of hope for refugees at the same time.” ####

---

name: Leah Vukmir
subject: FWD: did you see Paul’s endorsement?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Leah for Senate **
body:
My campaign for Senate gained the support of none other than Speaker of the House, Paul Ryan, and Congressman Jim Sensenbrenner, and I couldn’t be....
Friend,

Did you see yesterday’s news?

My campaign for Senate gained the support of none other than Speaker of the House, Paul Ryan, and Congressman Jim Sensenbrenner, and I couldn’t be more excited.

Paul and Jim are standing with me in the fight to take down Tammy Baldwin to bring true Wisconsin values to the Senate. To recognize this important moment in the campaign, **I’m looking to you.**
**[JOIN THE TEAM](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=854eba4a61bf4f14b8abb2a8ac39f592&_e=akeehhmnjuH-xf7SxP8i2xfpH7owQNF_5CjC3TMG7RiRUkPhi5xCzm4GL6r9wTS88v7og50S_CaDlVI4czIjFT3y8TxluodtpX89i485yrcOq0yj0bz1eWBXwgZN77lSqlCmevhBLz3abCrz6aMWNUmnAkfHgZBAJUJnrRYjmnZYAF2k7RKspeDY-mLaRTZiJ6acc-SAme4Q6wzGK7X82mwTV65DYT3TsNF_g-nm2aIf8LYoHUWP8Tkca_j8-jdh5c_VOQ-VGO4rX7v5CqY9ukjVsVPZk5r366_83X4XMqAKy4VLNI9RA9FuJukRehz1mUXgrxadJdDU2NQ4auHFO_uS8H6JAstjNprvNG77yPu-HmqUR-rZdIhrTecgZqooEi9KbxvG2S1ebinfeYNmabLCrrbHPBuaiZhJdGY0tcM%3D) **
---

Thank you for standing with Paul and me – we have important work to do.

-Leah

\-----Forwarded Message Below-----

****

Friend,

During my years representing Wisconsinites, I have seen our state take positive steps forward. What was once a blue state has become a beacon for conservative values, strong families, limited government, and lower taxes.

Leah Vukmir has been a principal driver of these reforms that improve things for families all across our state. She is motivated, experienced, and a determined leader. Guided by her dedication to her family and to Wisconsin, she has a proven track record that we can count on. **That’s why Congressman Jim Sensenbrenner and I are proud to endorse Leah for U.S. Senate.**
** ** ****[JOIN SPEAKER RYAN, ENDORSE LEAH](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=80d255427d5b4d6fa3cb87d23cf0003e&_m=854eba4a61bf4f14b8abb2a8ac39f592&_e=akeehhmnjuH-xf7SxP8i2xfpH7owQNF_5CjC3TMG7RiRUkPhi5xCzm4GL6r9wTS88v7og50S_CaDlVI4czIjFT3y8TxluodtpX89i485yrcOq0yj0bz1eWBXwgZN77lSqlCmevhBLz3abCrz6aMWNUmnAkfHgZBAJUJnrRYjmnZYAF2k7RKspeDY-mLaRTZimPGZhCoxsCkfVonfOI3vs7P_BjdwDWLiTg51HEhA_S7Y_vN5CLwQtWPLspPsQgznmyZWBzrATyoVNeu3gEJX_yXw_CAzpVbC7n2kGk3sJAGKbXso3YbvmFCF5VUIGMa0zY_BUNUya5_7PuBS_yrodeFrn3-gviFM_G4hZtf4q3uD5avw_tcYMz5_Wx9G391H-zdp_N-HkmxxoaMRq8AsBGOyULQkvbJgdbArHez55G0%3D)** **
---
**** ****

In the State Senate, Leah has been instrumental in cutting taxes, turning a deficit into a surplus with the passage of Act 10, and banning late-term abortions. But knowing Leah, she’s only just getting started. With Leah in the Senate, we’ll be able to put patients back in control of their health care decisions, take more Americans from welfare to work, and continue to defend our precious unborn. By law, the maximum amount an individual may contribute is $2,700 ($5,400 per couple) per election (for each primary and general election). Federal multi-candidate PACs may contribute $5,000 per election. Federal election law requires us to use our best efforts to report he name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer of individuals whose contributions aggregate to or exceed $200 during an election cycle. clean_body: My campaign for Senate gained the support of none other than Speaker of the House, Paul Ryan, and Congressman Jim Sensenbrenner, and I couldn’t be.... Friend, Did you see yesterday’s news? My campaign for Senate gained the support of none other than Speaker of the House, Paul Ryan, and Congressman Jim Sensenbrenner, and I couldn’t be more excited. Paul and Jim are standing with me in the fight to take down Tammy Baldwin to bring true Wisconsin values to the Senate. To recognize this important moment in the campaign, I’m looking to you. Thank you for standing with Paul and me – we have important work to do. -Leah \-----Forwarded Message Below----- ** Friend, During my years representing Wisconsinites, I have seen our state take positive steps forward. What was once a blue state has become a beacon for conservative values, strong families, limited government, and lower taxes. Leah Vukmir has been a principal driver of these reforms that improve things for families all across our state. She is motivated, experienced, and a determined leader. Guided by her dedication to her family and to Wisconsin, she has a proven track record that we can count on. That’s why Congressman Jim Sensenbrenner and I are proud to endorse Leah for U.S. Senate. In the State Senate, Leah has been instrumental in cutting taxes, turning a deficit into a surplus with the passage of Act 10, and banning late-term abortions. But knowing Leah, she’s only just getting started. With Leah in the Senate, we’ll be able to put patients back in control of their health care decisions, take more Americans from welfare to work, and continue to defend our precious unborn. We need Leah in the Senate, and that’s why we’re going to stand with her every step of the way. ** - Congressman Sensenbrenner and I would like to invite you to a campaign rally for Leah on Friday, July 6 at 5:30 p.m. in Pewaukee. We’re hoping conservative activists from all across the state will join us as we unite behind her because we know she is the best candidate to take on Senator Baldwin this fall. ** Friend, I hope you will join me in supporting Leah Vukmir and I look forward to seeing you on Friday evening. On Wisconsin, Paul Paid for by Leah for Senate

# Dear Fellow Patriot,
Please join us this **Saturday** , **June 30th** , and **Sunday July 1st** to help us **Get Out The Vote!**

There is only one Republican Congressional candidate In Arizona's First who can beat the incumbent Democrat, and that candidate is **Steve Smith**. While others talk about what they want to do, Steve has actually done it! He has a proven conservative record as a State Senator, with the highest ratings possible from every conservative watchdog group you can think of. He’s been named a champion for _taxpayers_ , _veterans_ , and for _securing our border_. That's why he’s been endorsed by the National Border Patrol Council, FreedomWorks for America, and so many conservative leaders like Senator Ted Cruz, Congressman Andy Biggs, and Trump Campaign COO Jeff DeWit.

**This Saturday and Sunday, June 30th and July 1st, let's reach as many voters as possible.**

We will have two convenient meeting locations. One in **Casa Grande** and one in **Maricopa**. Come to whichever location is most convenient for you, on one or both days. If neither location is convenient, but you want to help this Saturday or Sunday, just RSVP with your address and we will send you a walk list of Republican voters in your own neighborhood. We will show you exactly what to do to help Steve win! **Whatever you can do to help, please RSVP to Linda.**

This _**Saturday June 30th**_

**9:00 AM in Maricopa** at:
Starbucks
21423 N. John Wayne Pkwy, Suite 101
Maricopa, AZ 85139
North of Smith Enke Rd

**AND **

**9:00 AM in Casa Grande** at:
Pinal County Conservative Office at Arizona Plaza
408 N Sacaton St, Suite H
Casa Grande, AZ 85122

This _**Sunday July 1st**_

**9:00 AM in Maricopa** at:
Starbucks
21423 N. John Wayne Pkwy, Suite 101
Maricopa, AZ 85139
North of Smith Enke Rd

For more information, please **call Linda** at**516-784-9417** or reply to this email.

**Help us send Mr. Smith to Washington!**

You can learn more about Steve and his record by visiting [SteveSmithAZ.com](https://SteveSmithAZ.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=744cc59eec9e4f21a849aa145&id=b0cb706250&e=1fa29a1af8).

**Thank you for your support, and God Bless.**

Linda Lee Murtha
Deputy Campaign Manager
Steve Smith for Congress

clean_body: Let's flip CD1 from Democrat to Republican!!! -- | | | | | | | Dear Fellow Patriot, Please join us this Saturday , June 30th , and Sunday July 1st to help us Get Out The Vote! There is only one Republican Congressional candidate In Arizona's First who can beat the incumbent Democrat, and that candidate is Steve Smith. While others talk about what they want to do, Steve has actually done it! He has a proven conservative record as a State Senator, with the highest ratings possible from every conservative watchdog group you can think of. He’s been named a champion for taxpayers , veterans , and for securing our border. That's why he’s been endorsed by the National Border Patrol Council, FreedomWorks for America, and so many conservative leaders like Senator Ted Cruz, Congressman Andy Biggs, and Trump Campaign COO Jeff DeWit. This Saturday and Sunday, June 30th and July 1st, let's reach as many voters as possible. We will have two convenient meeting locations. One in Casa Grande and one in Maricopa. Come to whichever location is most convenient for you, on one or both days. If neither location is convenient, but you want to help this Saturday or Sunday, just RSVP with your address and we will send you a walk list of Republican voters in your own neighborhood. We will show you exactly what to do to help Steve win! Whatever you can do to help, please RSVP to Linda. This Saturday June 30th 9:00 AM in Maricopa at: Starbucks 21423 N. John Wayne Pkwy, Suite 101 Maricopa, AZ 85139 North of Smith Enke Rd AND 9:00 AM in Casa Grande at: Pinal County Conservative Office at Arizona Plaza 408 N Sacaton St, Suite H Casa Grande, AZ 85122 This Sunday July 1st 9:00 AM in Maricopa at: Starbucks 21423 N. John Wayne Pkwy, Suite 101 Maricopa, AZ 85139 North of Smith Enke Rd For more information, please call Linda at516-784-9417 or reply to this email. Help us send Mr. Smith to Washington! You can learn more about Steve and his record by visiting . Thank you for your support, and God Bless. Linda Lee Murtha Deputy Campaign Manager Steve Smith for Congress | | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | Thank you for subscribing to the Steve Smith for Congress campaign updates list. name: Kathy Manning
subject: The worst of Washington, but the best in one another
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
|
---

| | These past few weeks have tested our country and our values in ways that a few years ago seemed unimaginable. Lately, it seems like we're seeing the worst from Washington. From attempts to gut protections for Americans with pre-existing conditions to the unconscionable ripping apart families at our border, the challenges of a dysfunctional Washington continue to build up. We're seeing what can happen when Washington and Congress let partisan bickering and misplaced priorities stop us from solving tough problems. Too many Washington politicians putting party over country and too few courageous leaders stepping up to not only solve problems, but protect our values at the same time. We can and must do both. But as I continue to travel across this district, thousands of you are speaking out, helping spread the word, and joining our campaign to bring common sense, principled leadership back to Congress. We know we can do better. We know North Carolina and our country deserve better. Every day, more people join our forward-looking campaign for courageous leadership in Washington. We may be seeing the worst out of Washington, but **_we are seeing the best in one another and for that, I couldn 't be more grateful._** | [](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542786f/e3b7d3/5c8a9f88/2555e0f4/2008703289/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180626ldz?refcode=kme180626ldz_m")
---
From meeting with voters at their homes in Lexington, conversations over coffee in Greensboro, and visiting small businesses in Thomasville, it continues to be a privilege to hear from so many North Carolinians who are energized, engaged, and ready for a Congress that reflects our values and is willing to get hard things done. They are ready for a representative who isn't beholden to corporate special interests or their party's leadership -- they want an independent voice that will put North Carolina families first.
[](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542786f/e3b7d3/5c8a9f88/2555e0f4/2008703289/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180626ldz?refcode=kme180626ldz_m")
---
Between Greensboro Grasshoppers baseball games and stopping by barbecue restaurants in Statesville, I've heard from people on either side of the political aisle about the issues that are keeping them up at night. They want better paying jobs, more affordable healthcare, lower prescription drug prices, good public schools for their kids, and leaders who share their values.
Each day, we're picking up more and more grassroots support across North Carolina. We've continued to knock on doors in neighborhoods, make phone calls to voters, and register students to vote in this upcoming election.
[](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542786f/e3b7d3/5c8a9f88/2555e0f4/2008703289/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180626ldz?refcode=kme180626ldz_m")
---
I also couldn't be more proud of some pivotal endorsements this month. The League of Conservation Voters Action Fund recognized our campaign for our commitment to defend North Carolina's environment. I know a healthy environment and a strong economy go hand-in-hand, and I will champion both in Congress.
Last week, Governor Roy Cooper endorsed our campaign, highlighting my _" proven track record of bringing people together"_ and our campaign's emphasis on cutting _" through the partisan dysfunction in Washington."_ I'm proud to stand with Governor Cooper to fight for strong public schools, affordable health care, and an economy that works for all North Carolinians.
**But perhaps my favorite endorsement is from a special baby in High Point named Royce!** I'm working hard to make sure he gets to grow up in a safe community with good public schools and leaders who care about his success!
[](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542786f/e3b7d3/5c8a9f88/2555e0f4/2008703289/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180626ldz?refcode=kme180626ldz_m")
---
It's been a busy month as we lay the groundwork for a winning campaign. While there's nothing but bad news lately out of Washington, there is plenty of good news and reason to be hopeful in North Carolina. I'm running for Congress to bring back common sense and courageous leadership to Washington, and there are thousands of people across our district who are standing with us.
_Together, we are going to put Congress on the right track._
[**You can help us continue to build our momentum by making a contribution toward our fast approaching FEC deadline, even if it 's just $5 >>**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542786f/e3b7d3/5c8a9f88/2555e0f4/2008703289/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180626ldz?refcode=kme180626ldz_m")
Every vote matters and every contribution gets us one step closer. Thank you for your support.
Kathy Manning

|
---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). [Click here to unsubscribe](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542786f/e3b7d3/5c8a9f88/2555e0fb/2008703289/VEsA/ "https://manning.bsd.net/unsubscribe") [www.kathymanning2018.com](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/6542786f/e3b7d3/5c8a9f88/2555e0fa/2008703289/VEsB/ "https://www.kathymanning2018.com/")

name: Reba K. (via Team Sinema)
subject: losing Arizona
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sinema for Arizona
body:
|
---
| | **FIRST:** Sheriff Joe Arpaio told fellow Republicans at a local event that he's desperate to "go after Sinema."

**THEN:** The Senate GOP's campaign arm launched a dishonest attack on Kyrsten and misled Arizonans about her record.

**NOW:** Kyrsten's fighting back with all she's got, but she's facing an uphill battle. A dark money group allied with Mitch McConnell and Karl Rove is blitzing the state with TV ads boosting one of her opponents.

**_[WHAT YOU CAN DO: Donate now to elect Kyrsten Sinema as the first woman senator from Arizona.>>](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-eoq2-18?amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=1+-+WHAT+YOU+CAN+DO+Donate+now+to+elect+Kyrs&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_D3_180626_1_3_3&source=KS_EM_FR_D3_180626_1_3_3&refcode=KS_EM_FR_D3_180626_1_3_3")_**

We can't let Sheriff Joe or Mitch McConnell or Karl Rove take this seat. To counter the attacks, Kyrsten urgently needs your help.

**_[Can you rush a donation to help us hit our goal to raise $50,000 before midnight on June 30?>>](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-eoq2-18?amount=10&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=2+-+Can+you+rush+a+donation+to+help+us+hit+o&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_D3_180626_1_3_3&source=KS_EM_FR_D3_180626_1_3_3&refcode=KS_EM_FR_D3_180626_1_3_3")_**
**It 's crucial our campaign has the resources to make sure Kyrsten can keep standing up to bullies like Sheriff Joe.**

Your donation will have an immediate impact. It means we can knock on more doors, hire more staff, and reach more Arizonans with our message.

**It means we can win this Senate seat.** If everyone receiving this email would just give $10 now, we would have more than a fighting chance.

**[Donate $10 or more to support Kyrsten Sinema!](http://act.kyrstensinema. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ks-eoq2-18?amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Mesa&state=AZ&zip=85214&phone=&occupation=&employer=&recurring=true&utm_medium=email&utm_source=sinema&utm_content=3+-+Donate+10+or+more+to+support+Kyrsten+Sin&utm_campaign=KS_EM_FR_D3_180626_1_3_3&source=KS_EM_FR_D3_180626_1_3_3&refcode=KS_EM_FR_D3_180626_1_3_3")**
Everyone knows Arizona is a battleground state this year.

Stopping Kyrsten's momentum has become a top priority for people like McConnell, Rove, and Sheriff Joe. They'll do whatever it takes to prevent her campaign for everyday Arizonans from winning this November.

Before Roy was sworn in as Governor, Republicans in the legislature worked to undermine him and attempted unconstitutional power grabs.

When the courts struck them down, many of us hoped the Republican leaders would give the partisan games a rest.

No chance.

Not only have they not stopped, they're going even further this time. They're trying to give legislators complete control over appointments to boards and commissions. They're working overtime to try to rig our elections. As a way to get around the courts that rule against them, they're proposing changes to our state's constitution to give them more power.

Peter,

By the end of today, we'll officially be through more than HALF of our primary election days this cycle.

Before we enter the next phase of the cycle, I want to make sure you're a part of this winning team.

So I took a look at our supporter records, and here's what I have down for this email address:
**2018 Cycle Donor Status:** Not yet
**Suggested Action:[Donate $3 to help reach our $400,000 End-of-Quarter goal and help pro-choice Democratic women WIN this cycle.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c417a/24c69fd9/1960ec6d4/1883c73d/846770007/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180626_email_JuneEOQ?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donateif+consinConsGroup9225++again+else&utm_campaign=WQEFER63N_digital_email_20180626_JuneEOQSupRec_inact&source=WQEFER63N_digital_email_20180626_JuneEOQSupRec_inact")**
Between multiple special election wins, successfully moving more than a dozen candidates through crowded House primaries, and all the while endorsing more and more women every week, this community has stepped up in a BIG way.

We can't take our foot off the gas, though. Twenty-four states have primary or run-off elections still to come, and we have women running up and down the ballot in many of them.

Then it'll be a race to November, when our women can kick dozens -- maybe even hundreds -- of Republicans out of office.

Make sure you're not sitting on the sidelines for what could be a record-breaking year.

**Donate $3 to help reach our End-of-Quarter goal and give it all you've got this cycle:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Reach-June-Goal](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c417a/24c69fd9/1960ec6d4/1883c73e/846770007/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180626_email_JuneEOQ?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgReachJuneGoal&utm_campaign=WQEFER63N_digital_email_20180626_JuneEOQSupRec_inact&source=WQEFER63N_digital_email_20180626_JuneEOQSupRec_inact")**

Thanks -- and go team!

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List

name: Anne Holton
subject: My dad told Tim he was crazy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
I'll give you an example: When Tim first told my dad he wanted to run for city council in 1994 - well, my dad told him he was crazy. -------------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Derek,

If you're like me, watching the news lately can make you heartsick. But I really believe that we can switch gears to a big-hearted America - a place where we champion our idealism again.

Which is why Tim's race is so important. Tim has always believed that with positivity and idealism, we really can turn anything around and make our city, state, and country work for _ALL_ people.

I'll give you an example: When Tim first told my dad he wanted to run for city council in 1994 - **well, my dad told him he was crazy.**

My dad, Republican Governor Linwood Holton, had encouraged Tim to get involved in government himself, but he knew city council was a difficult place and according to him, even the strongest idealists could get buried there.

But Tim had the same determination to serve then that he still has today, so he went for it. He has always believed in a positive vision and making a "Virginia for all." And I truly believe his long-held idealism is something we need right now more than ever.

**That 's why we're all working so hard to make sure Tim wins in November - the stakes are too high for any of us to sit on the sidelines.** [Tim has his first public deadline since having an opponent at the end of this month. Will you chip in to make sure we meet our $200,000 General Election Fund goal? >>](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13a7/3e0906/68b14be4/3e345dc6/1053410512/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180626_1_FR_Anne_Surrogate-EOQ&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Tim+has+his+first+public+deadline+since+&utm_campaign=20180626_1_FR_Anne_Surrogate-EOQ&source=20180626_1_FR_Anne_Surrogate-EOQ") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13a7/3e0906/68b14be4/3e345dc5/1053410512/VEsE/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20180626_1_FR_Anne_Surrogate-EOQ_express_lane_5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20180626_1_FR_Anne_Surrogate-EOQ&source=20180626_1_FR_Anne_Surrogate-EOQ")
---
| [**DONATE $50**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13a7/3e0906/68b14be4/3e345dc4/1053410512/VEsF/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20180626_1_FR_Anne_Surrogate-EOQ_express_lane_50&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+DONATE+50&utm_campaign=20180626_1_FR_Anne_Surrogate-EOQ&source=20180626_1_FR_Anne_Surrogate-EOQ")
---
| [**DONATE $100**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13a7/3e0906/68b14be4/3e345ddb/1053410512/VEsC/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20180626_1_FR_Anne_Surrogate-EOQ_express_lane_100&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+DONATE+100&utm_campaign=20180626_1_FR_Anne_Surrogate-EOQ&source=20180626_1_FR_Anne_Surrogate-EOQ")
---
| [**OTHER**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13a7/3e0906/68b14be4/3e345dda/1053410512/VEsD/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180626_1_FR_Anne_Surrogate-EOQ_express_lane_other&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+OTHER&utm_campaign=20180626_1_FR_Anne_Surrogate-EOQ&source=20180626_1_FR_Anne_Surrogate-EOQ")
---
For Tim's entire life, his commitment to equality and justice has shone bright enough for everyone to see. I knew from as soon as we met that Tim would serve others admirably because I saw the same spirit in him that I saw in my dad.

Other people saw that spirit, too. I am so proud that my home of Virginia gave a little-known civil rights lawyer a shot to serve in the city council, then as mayor, as Governor, and now as our Senator. **And with so much on the line in 2018, I hope Virginia elects him again this year.**

Our family is working to re-elect Tim, but we can't do this alone.

**This is the campaign 's first public filing deadline since having an opponent, and we're still $19,000 dollars away from reaching our goal.** [Will you chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can spare today to make sure we reach that goal and send a loud message?](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13a7/3e0906/68b14be4/3e345dd9/1053410512/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180626_1_FR_Anne_Surrogate-EOQ&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+Will+you+chip+in+5+10+or+whatever+you+ca&utm_campaign=20180626_1_FR_Anne_Surrogate-EOQ&source=20180626_1_FR_Anne_Surrogate-EOQ")

[**DONATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13a7/3e0906/68b14be4/3e345dd8/1053410512/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018-general-election-fund?refcode=20180626_1_FR_Anne_Surrogate-EOQ&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=20180626_1_FR_Anne_Surrogate-EOQ&source=20180626_1_FR_Anne_Surrogate-EOQ")
---

Thanks for helping re-elect Tim!

_Anne_

We believe that emails are a crucial way for our campaign to stay in touch with supporters like you. However, if you'd prefer to receive fewer emails, you can [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13a7/3e0906/68b14be4/3e345dd2/1053410512/VEsHBg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=13+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20180626_1_FR_Anne_Surrogate-EOQ&source=20180626_1_FR_Anne_Surrogate-EOQ")

Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you. Your grassroots support is critical to re-electing Tim Kaine to the Senate. If you'd like to donate to our campaign, please [**click here.**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13a7/3e0906/68b14be4/3e345dd1/1053410512/VEsHAQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=email_footer&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=14+-+click+here&utm_campaign=20180626_1_FR_Anne_Surrogate-EOQ&source=20180626_1_FR_Anne_Surrogate-EOQ") Thanks for having Tim's back!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Courtland=20Sykes?=
subject: The Truth About Children at the Border
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COURTLAND SYKES FOR SENATE
body:
The Dems are DEAD WRONG | |
---
| | | **Peter,**

Democrats are telling us daily that Department of Homeland Security is "separating children at the border from their 'families'"

**This narrative is a dangerous and heartbreaking lie.**

Northern Mexico is the most volatile region in the world: more than 25,000 deaths due to armed conflict each year.

Compared to Afghanistan, with 16,000 deaths, the United States would be safer today if we bordered Afghanistan than it is right now bordering Mexico.

**The largest enterprise in northern Mexico is criminal activity, illicit drug trading, sex trafficking, and arms trafficking. **

**The reality?:**

**Street children out of Guatemala, El Salvador, Honduras, and Mexico, are being used as mules for the drug trade or as prostitutes in sex trafficking.**

These children are being used by monstrous gangs as shields to create a pathway for drug smuggling, sex trafficking, and arms dealings to cross illegally into the United States.

By having an open border, and sanctuary cities, to help children "stay with their families" we only encourage more cartels, gangs, and prostiution rings to TAKE AND USE CHILDREN as a pathway into the United States to carry out more evil.

To make matters worse, we have a blatantly ignorant portion of the public who are buying into the Democrats' narrative that these children are seeking safety in the United States with their families.

THIS LIBERAL NARRATIVE MUST BE STOPPED. DHS are PROTECTING THESE CHILDREN.

By claiming that DHS is committing "child abuse" for protecting these children at the border, Democrats are going to cause more children will go missing off the streets of Central America in the hands of drug cartels and child sex traffickers.

With the likes of George Clooney and Nancy Pelosi and Rachel Maddow wailing each day about the "cruelty" of "separating" children from their "families," the United States is signaling to the underworld that we welcome any illegal immigrant so long as they have a crying child in tow.

**The depths of this evil is beyond abhorrent. The ignorance of the left allowing this to happen is perhaps a greater evil.**

This is heartbreaking.

DHS only separates children from the custodian if:
* Custodian cannot prove relationship to child
* Child is at risk
* Custodian is engaged in criminal activity

When families come across the border from Honduras, Guatemala, El Salvador, etc. with documentation from their country and seek asylum, DHS does NOT separate these families.

The only reason DHS separates children from the custodian is to protect the child.

While Democrats stand around and call our DHS agents "Nazis" I understand the dangers of the DHS's job in protecting the Untied States and protecting children who are being used to cross our southern border.

I know that our DHS agents will lay down their lives to protect these children and to protect American citizens.

Liberal Democrats only want to make the situation worse.

I have been on the ground on our southern border and Central America, I know firsthand the pernicious evils pouring into our wide open southern border.

We need more senators who understand these issues from the ground up. I do. That is why I am running.

[I need your help. Stand with me on this. I am fighting for all of us.](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=ddee09f01f&e=9da9b0ca31)

[](https://sykesforsenate2018.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4cc1eaa615d77dd655322ba1d&id=1716668fed&e=9da9b0ca31)
Courtland Sykes

clean_body: The Dems are DEAD WRONG | | | | | Peter, Democrats are telling us daily that Department of Homeland Security is "separating children at the border from their 'families'" This narrative is a dangerous and heartbreaking lie. Northern Mexico is the most volatile region in the world: more than 25,000 deaths due to armed conflict each year. Compared to Afghanistan, with 16,000 deaths, the United States would be safer today if we bordered Afghanistan than it is right now bordering Mexico. The largest enterprise in northern Mexico is criminal activity, illicit drug trading, sex trafficking, and arms trafficking. The reality?: Street children out of Guatemala, El Salvador, Honduras, and Mexico, are being used as mules for the drug trade or as prostitutes in sex trafficking. These children are being used by monstrous gangs as shields to create a pathway for drug smuggling, sex trafficking, and arms dealings to cross illegally into the United States. By having an open border, and sanctuary cities, to help children "stay with their families" we only encourage more cartels, gangs, and prostiution rings to TAKE AND USE CHILDREN as a pathway into the United States to carry out more evil. To make matters worse, we have a blatantly ignorant portion of the public who are buying into the Democrats' narrative that these children are seeking safety in the United States with their families. THIS LIBERAL NARRATIVE MUST BE STOPPED. DHS are PROTECTING THESE CHILDREN. By claiming that DHS is committing "child abuse" for protecting these children at the border, Democrats are going to cause more children will go missing off the streets of Central America in the hands of drug cartels and child sex traffickers. With the likes of George Clooney and Nancy Pelosi and Rachel Maddow wailing each day about the "cruelty" of "separating" children from their "families," the United States is signaling to the underworld that we welcome any illegal immigrant so long as they have a crying child in tow. The depths of this evil is beyond abhorrent. The ignorance of the left allowing this to happen is perhaps a greater evil. This is heartbreaking. DHS only separates children from the custodian if: Custodian cannot prove relationship to child Child is at risk Custodian is engaged in criminal activity When families come across the border from Honduras, Guatemala, El Salvador, etc. with documentation from their country and seek asylum, DHS does NOT separate these families. The only reason DHS separates children from the custodian is to protect the child. While Democrats stand around and call our DHS agents "Nazis" I understand the dangers of the DHS's job in protecting the Untied States and protecting children who are being used to cross our southern border. I know that our DHS agents will lay down their lives to protect these children and to protect American citizens. Liberal Democrats only want to make the situation worse. I have been on the ground on our southern border and Central America, I know firsthand the pernicious evils pouring into our wide open southern border. We need more senators who understand these issues from the ground up. I do. That is why I am running. Courtland Sykes | | | | | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | ---|--- | | | Sykes is America's boldest, most outspoken candidate on issues you care most about: God and Family First Pro-Strong Military Pro-Wall Pro-Gun Pro-Law Enforcement Pro-Lower Taxes Pro-Energy Pro-School Choice Oppose-Radical Feminist Agenda Oppose-Globalism Oppose-Green Lunacy #1 Constitutional Conservative America Number One MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY COURTLAND SYKES FOR SENATE Courtland Sykes for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Today's Supreme Court Decision:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
We can't count on anyone in D.C. being a check or balance...

| [](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78d43/2f5ea88d/70004181/2cbce680/1395930793/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-scotus?utm_source=ema_2018-06-26_scotus-muslim-ban&source=ema_2018-06-26_scotus-muslim-ban&utm_campaign=scotus-muslim-ban&utm_medium=ema") Our families.
Our Constitution.
Our American values. Friend, today's Supreme Court decision upholding Donald Trump's Muslim ban threatens our democracy, our security, and our people. Republicans in D.C. refused to give Merrick Garland, President Obama's nominee, a hearing. And now we see the consequences -- a Supreme Court unwilling to be a check and balance on a dangerous president. We should be mad. We should be angry. And we must be mobilized to speak up, fight back, and take action. Today's decision proves that our system of checks and balances on a rogue president has failed. Discrimination should never be accepted in this country. This is clearly a call for action from all of us. [**If we can't count on our systems of checks and balances working in D.C., we must strengthen the progressive movement in our states. That's why we're walking the walk to prove the power of a progressive agenda -- be a part of this work by investing $5 today.**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78d43/2f5ea88d/70004181/2cbce680/1395930793/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-scotus?utm_source=ema_2018-06-26_scotus-muslim-ban&source=ema_2018-06-26_scotus-muslim-ban&utm_campaign=scotus-muslim-ban&utm_medium=ema") Washington will always be a state that opens its doors to newcomers. It's why we sued Trump over his disastrous border policy, and it's why we passed a law that stops the disclosure of religious affiliation to the federal government. We won't back down here, no matter what D.C. does. Right now, change is going to come from the states -- not from the White House, the Congress, nor the Court in D.C. To be on the frontlines of fighting for that change, I need you on my team. I've got the biggest deadline of 2018 coming up at the end of June. If you're ready for this fight, I hope you'll invest in the work ahead: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Inslee-SCOTUS**](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78d43/2f5ea88d/70004181/2cbce680/1395930793/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-scotus?utm_source=ema_2018-06-26_scotus-muslim-ban&source=ema_2018-06-26_scotus-muslim-ban&utm_campaign=scotus-muslim-ban&utm_medium=ema") The folks in D.C. aren't going to get away with this. Not if all of us are mobilized to fight back. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [CHIP IN »](https://action.jayinslee.com/page/m/7bd78d43/2f5ea88d/70004181/2cbce680/1395930793/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/inslee-scotus?utm_source=ema_2018-06-26_scotus-muslim-ban&source=ema_2018-06-26_scotus-muslim-ban&utm_campaign=scotus-muslim-ban&utm_medium=ema")

name: Team Donnelly
subject: Rep. Braun is right (for once)!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
Republican Rep. Mike Braun is going around with a strange attack on Joe. He's saying that Joe saved the Affordable Care Act. |
---

| | _**NEW GOP ATTACK ON JOE:**_
**Rep. Braun is saying that Joe saved the Affordable Care Act!

Wait... that's an attack?!** | **********[**Pitch in for a senator who fights for health care >>**](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2e3d/7377f838/3ce6fef4/51f9d686/1254230045/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-octaca?refcode=20180626.2nd&amount=25")**********
---
Peter,

Republican Rep. Mike Braun is going around with a strange attack on Joe. He's saying that Joe saved the Affordable Care Act.

You know what? **Rep. Braun is right (for once)! Joe voted for the ACA, voted to protect it time and again, and what 's more, he's _proud_ of it.** Because when he voted last year to save the ACA, Joe:
* Kept health care bills from increasing by $1,000 for the average Hoosier
* Ensured that insurance companies aren't able to discriminate against women, seniors, and people with pre-existing conditions
* Protected health care for over 400,000 Hoosiers

The fact that Rep. Braun thinks it's A-OK to take care away from all those people shows that he and Joe could not be more different. And here's another difference: **Rep. Braun gave his own campaign _millions_ of dollars and has the support of the Washington GOP money machine. _Joe has you._ Will you pitch in to give him the support he needs to beat Rep. Braun in November?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

"In an election they said we'd never win, you were able to get me elected into the United States Senate. **And when that vote came up last year, we were able to protect health care by one vote**."
\-- Joe Donnelly
---
Peter, **_ELECTIONS MATTER_**. We elected Joe in 2012, and he stood up for us. Now we have to elect him again in 2018 -- or Republicans will replace him with Rep. Braun, who's chomping at the bit to destroy the ACA, pass more tax cuts for billionaires, and privatize Social Security.
